Document community health impacts near oil operations — report to Defensoría del Pueblo
Report through Ecopetrol's ethics line or international operator compliance channels
Ecopetrol: Accelerate energy transition strategy with binding renewable targets
Wdrożyć TCFD-aligned reporting across all operations
Inwestować w energia odnawialna in post-conflict zones to provide economic alternatives
MinAmbiente: Wzmocnić środowiskowy licensing for extractive projects in biodiverse regions
CREG: Zreformować energy tariffs to accelerate energia odnawialna deployment
ANH: Wdrożyć na złoże emisje monitoring
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Representante or Senador in the Congreso to support the energy transition framework legislation
Wzmocnić Colombia's NDC with binding sectoral emisje reduction targets
Leverage OECD membership to advance środowiskowy governance standards
Support the Leticia Pact for Amazon conservation as alternative economic model
i: ANLA (Autoridad Nacional de Licencias Ambientales) — Colombia's środowiskowy licensing authority, responsible for środowiskowy impact assessment and compliance monitoring for extractive projects. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national human rights ombudsman. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office overseeing public resource management including oil revenues.

Ecopetrol — Colombia's largest company (88.5% państwowe), responsible for most domestic oil production. Ecopetrol has announced energy transition targets but continues significant upstream investment. ANH (Agencia Nacional de Hidrocarburos) — manages exploration and production contracts.

MinAmbiente (Ministerio de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible) — Colombia's environment ministry. CREG (Comisión de Regulación de Energía y Gas) — the regulator energiiy commission. CAR (Corporaciones Autónomas Regionales) — regional środowiskowy authorities.

Congreso de la República de Colombia — bicameral legislature: Cámara de Representantes (188 members) and Senado (108 members). Contact through camara.gov.co and senado.gov.co. Colombia is an OECD member (2020) with strong democratic institutions. The 2016 Peace Agreement (Acuerdo de Paz) created new governance frameworks for former conflict zones that intersect with extractive industry regulation.

CR.s: Upper-middle-income gospodarka ($95.4B PKB) with 98%+ renewable electricity generation. No military since 1948. Services-dominant (68.8% PKB). Leader in ecotourism and środowiskowy policy. Low direct fossil fuel extraction. Main PST exposure through agricultural monoculture (pineapple, banana, palm oil).

sectors.w: Costa Rica's pineapple and banana monoculture uses intensive pesticide application that contaminates waterways. Gdy per-farm pesticide runoff and water contamination data is published alongside export revenue, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Zreformować agricultural export incentives to reward biodiversity-positive farming. Gdy export tax benefits require środowiskowy certification, the nakładający się interes between monoculture producers and exporters in chemical-intensive production słabnie.

Mandatory per-farm water quality monitoring downstream of monoculture operations. Costa Rica's AyA (water utility) and SINAC already collect water data — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Tropical monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, Costa Rica's Payment for Environmental Services (PSA) program demonstrates viable alternatives.
a: Report pesticide violations to SFE (Servicio Fitosanitario del Estado)
Document water contamination — report to MINAE (Ministry of Environment) or AyA
Use Costa Rica's labor protections and środowiskowy complaint mechanisms
Agricultural exporters (Del Monte, Dole, Chiquita): Przyjąć pesticide reduction targets
Inwestować w organic certification and agroforestry transitions
Wdrożyć watershed-level środowiskowy monitoring
MAG (Ministry of Agriculture): Zreformować export incentives to require środowiskowy certification
MINAE: Wzmocnić pesticide regulations and enforce water quality standards near monoculture areas
SETENA: Require cumulative środowiskowy impact assessments for monoculture expansion
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Diputado in the Asamblea Legislativa by zażądać pesticide reduction legislation for monoculture agriculture
Support the Escazú Agreement implementation (Costa Rica was an early advocate)
Leverage Costa Rica's środowiskowy reputation to advance international agricultural sustainability standards
Naciskać na green trade provisions in bilateral agreements
i: SFE (Servicio Fitosanitario del Estado) — the state phytosanitary service regulating pesticide use. MINAE (Ministerio de Ambiente y Energía) — the environment and energy ministry. AyA (Instituto Costarricense de Acueductos y Alcantarillados) — the national water utility. SETENA (Secretaría Técnica Nacional Ambiental) — conducts środowiskowy impact assessments.

Costa Rica hosts operations of major fruit multinationals: Del Monte, Dole, Chiquita. CORBANA (Corporación Bananera Nacional) — the national banana corporation coordinating the sector. CANAPEP (Cámara Nacional de Productores y Exportadores de Piña) — the pineapple producers' association.

MAG (Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería) — Costa Rica's agriculture ministry. The PSA (Pago por Servicios Ambientales) program — Costa Rica's pioneering payment for środowiskowy services program, which pays landowners to maintain forest cover, funded partly by a fuel tax.

Asamblea Legislativa de Costa Rica — unicameral parliament with 57 members. Citizens can contact representatives through asamblea.go.cr. Costa Rica is one of Latin America's strongest democracies and a global środowiskowy leader. The Escazú Agreement — Costa Rica was one of the first signatories of this regional agreement on środowiskowy access rights.

CU.s: Command gospodarka ($107.4B PKB, though estimates vary due to dual currency system). Services-dominant (73.5% PKB, driven by healthcare, education, tourism). Minimal resource extraction. Economic crisis exacerbated by US embargo and collapse of Venezuelan oil subsidies.

sectors.w: Cuba's sugar industry collapsed after Soviet subsidies ended, but remaining agriculture (state farms, cooperatives) relies on monoculture patterns. Cuba's organic farming necessity (post-Soviet fertilizer shortage) demonstrates alternative models. Making soil health data visible breaks system independence.
bp: Expand the urban agriculture and organoponics model that Cuba developed out of necessity. Gdy organic production meets domestic food needs more reliably than import-dependent monoculture, nakładający się interes w conventional agriculture breaks.
Publish soil health, water quality, and biodiversity data from Cuba's extensive agricultural research system. Cuba's scientific institutions (INIFAT, ICA) generate data that could make W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Cuba's experience with organic farming post-1991 shows that zależność systemowa on chemical inputs can be dramatically reduced through agroecological methods.
a: Document środowiskowy degradation through academic research channels
Report through workplace union structures (CTC — Central de Trabajadores de Cuba)
Engage with international agricultural research partnerships
State agricultural enterprises: Scale organoponics and agroecological methods
AZCUBA: Diversify sugar industry toward bioenergy and specialty products
International partners: Support technology transfer for sustainable agriculture
MINAG: Expand support for agroecological transition
CITMA: Wzmocnić środowiskowy monitoring of agricultural practices
INIFAT: Publish research on agroecological transition outcomes
Support FAO technical cooperation programs for Cuban agricultural sustainability
Wspierać przez CELAC for regional agricultural knowledge exchange
Naciskać na relaxation of US embargo restrictions on agricultural technology transfer
Support South-South cooperation on agroecological methods developed in Cuba
i: Note: Cuba is a państwo jednopartyjne. Independent społeczeństwo obywatelskie, media, and labor organizations are not permitted. Reporting channels operate within state structures. CTC (Central de Trabajadores de Cuba) — the state-controlled trade union federation. INIFAT (Instituto Nacional de Investigaciones Fundamentales en Agricultura Tropical) — the national agricultural research institute. CITMA (Ministerio de Ciencia, Tecnología y Medio Ambiente) — the science and environment ministry.

AZCUBA (Empresa Azucarera) — Cuba's state sugar enterprise. State agricultural enterprises and UBPCs (Unidades Básicas de Producción Cooperativa) — cooperatives managing most agricultural production. Cuba's urban agriculture program is one of the world's most successful, producing significant food in cities through organoponics.

MINAG (Ministerio de la Agricultura) — Cuba's agriculture ministry. CITMA — oversees środowiskowy policy and scientific research. The Asociación Nacional de Agricultores Pequeños (ANAP) — the national small farmers' association, which has been a key partner in agroecological transition.

Note: Cuba's Asamblea Nacional del Poder Popular (605 members) is the legislature but functions within a one-party system. International engagement channels: FAO (Cuba has received recognition for reducing hunger), CELAC (Community of Latin American and Caribbean States), NAM (Non-Aligned Movement). Cuba's agroecological experience is studied globally as a model for post-petrochemical agriculture.

CY.s: Small EU island gospodarka ($37.6B PKB) with dominant services sector (76.5% PKB, driven by financial services, shipping, and tourism). No significant resource extraction. Post-2013 banking crisis reforms strengthened financial regulation. Division between Republic of Cyprus and northern territory.

sectors.w: Cyprus's financial services sector has historically facilitated capital flows from Russia and other jurisdictions. EU AML directives and beneficial ownership przejrzystość requirements make the welfare impact of opaque financial intermediation computable.
bp: Full implementation of EU Anti-Money Laundering Directives and beneficial ownership przejrzystość. Gdy financial secrecy is eliminated, the nakładający się interes between Cypriot service providers and clients seeking opacity słabnie.

Mandatory publication of Country-by-Country Reporting (CbCR) data for entities registered in Cyprus. EU ATAD and DAC6 frameworks provide the mechanism — making tax planning structures visible breaks system independence.
Częściowo łamalne. Financial intermediation can relocate — but Cyprus's członek UEship, common law heritage, and timezone advantages create switching costs.
a: Report suspicious transactions to MOKAS (Unit for Combating Money Laundering)
Document beneficial ownership concealment — report to CySEC (Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission)
Use EU Whistleblower Directive protections (transposed 2022)
Wdrożyć enhanced due diligence for all high-risk client relationships
Przyjąć full beneficial ownership przejrzystość ahead of EU AMLD6 requirements
Integrate ESG criteria into financial advisory services
CySEC: Wzmocnić beneficial ownership verification requirements
CBC: Egzekwować enhanced AML due diligence for correspondent banking relationships
ICPAC (Institute of Certified Public Accountants): Ensure audit firms enforce przejrzystość standards
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Βουλευτής in the Βουλή των Αντιπροσώπων (House of Representatives) by zażądać full implementation of EU AML directives
Support EU AMLD6 negotiations for enhanced przejrzystość requirements
Advocate for OECD BEPS Inclusive Framework strengthening
Naciskać na EU-wide beneficial ownership registry interconnection
i: MOKAS (Μονάδα Καταπολέμησης Αδικημάτων Συγκάλυψης / Unit for Combating Money Laundering) — Cyprus's financial intelligence unit. CySEC (Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission) — the securities and financial markets regulator. CBC (Central Bank of Cyprus) — the prudential supervisor of banks. Cyprus transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

Cyprus hosts approximately 40 licensed banks and numerous investment firms. The Cyprus Investment Firms sector manages significant cross-border capital flows. CIFA (Cyprus Investment Funds Association) — the industry association representing investment fund managers.

CySEC — responsible for securities regulation and investment firm supervision. CBC (Central Bank of Cyprus) — conducts banking supervision and AML compliance monitoring. ICPAC — the professional body for accountants and auditors in Cyprus.

Βουλή των Αντιπροσώπων (House of Representatives) — unicameral parliament with 56 elected members (80 seats including 24 reserved for Turkish Cypriot community). Contact through parliament.cy. Cyprus is an członek UE with robust democratic institutions. Moneyval (Council of Europe's Committee of Experts on the Evaluation of Anti-Money Laundering Measures) evaluates Cyprus's AML framework.

CZ.s: Central European industrial gospodarka ($347B PKB) with strong manufacturing (19.9% PKB, automotive-dominated). Small coal sector (lignite in northern Bohemia). członek UE. Significant nuclear energy capacity (Dukovany, Temelín). Usługi na poziomie 60.2% PKB.

sectors.w: Czechia's lignite górnictwo is concentrated in the Ústí nad Labem region (Sokolovská uhelná, Severní energetická). EU ETS carbon pricing makes Czech lignite uncompetitive — the nakładający się interes between mine operators and local employment breaks when carbon costs exceed revenue.
bp: Align with EU ETS carbon pricing and eliminate free allowances for Czech lignite power. Gdy plants pay the full carbon price, lignite electricity becomes more expensive than alternatives and the nakładający się interes breaks.
Mandatory na elektrownię emisje and health-impact reporting. Czech lignite plants cause significant air pollution — publishing health costs per MWh makes W computable.
Nie do złamania. Lignite combustion releases CO₂ and pollutants by physical process.
a: Report emisje violations to ČIŽP (Czech Environmental Inspectorate)
Document health impacts in górnictwo communities — report to regional public health authorities
Use the Czech sygnalista protection law (zákon o ochraně oznamovatelů, 2023)
ČEZ (majority państwowe): Accelerate coal phase-out timeline and energia odnawialna investment
Sev.en Energy: Opracować mine closure and site remediation plans
Inwestować w nuclear energy expansion as baseload alternative
ERÚ: Zreformować electricity tariffs to reflect carbon costs
MŽP: Wzmocnić air quality enforcement in górnictwo regions
Czech Coal Commission: Wdrożyć recommendations on coal phase-out by 2033
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Poslanec or Senátor in the Parlament by zażądać a binding coal phase-out timeline with just transition measures
Support EU Just Transition Fund allocation for Ústí nad Labem and Moravian-Silesian regions
Advocate for accelerated EU ETS reform
Naciskać na Territorial Just Transition Plans with concrete retraining programs
i: ČIŽP (Česká inspekce životního prostředí / Czech Environmental Inspectorate) — the enforcement agency for środowiskowy law, conducting inspections and imposing sankcje. MŽP (Ministerstvo životního prostředí / Ministry of the Environment) — oversees środowiskowy policy. Zákon o ochraně oznamovatelů (Act on Protection of Whistleblowers, 2023) — Czech transposition of EU Whistleblower Directive.

ČEZ Group — Czechia's largest energy company (70% państwowe), operating coal, nuclear, and renewable power plants. Sev.en Energy — the largest private lignite górnictwo and power company. Sokolovská uhelná — operates lignite mines in the Sokolov basin.

ERÚ (Energetický regulační úřad / Energy Regulatory Office) — the independent regulator energii. Czech Coal Commission (Uhelná komise) — established to recommend a coal phase-out date. Recommended 2033, but implementation timelines remain debated.

Parlament České republiky — bicameral: Poslanecká sněmovna (200 members) and Senát (81 members). Contact through psp.cz and senat.cz. EU Just Transition Fund — Czechia is eligible for significant funding for coal-dependent regions.

DK.s: Advanced Nordic gospodarka ($424.5B PKB) with global leadership in wind energy (Vestas, Ørsted). Intensive livestock agriculture (28M pigs for 5.8M people) creates significant nitrogen pollution. Usługi na poziomie 63.5% PKB. World's most ambitious climate law (70% reduction by 2030).

sectors.w: Denmark's intensive pig farming generates nitrogen pollution visible in marine dead zones (inner Danish waters, Baltic Sea). EU Nitrates Directive compliance data makes W computable from farm-level nitrogen balance sheets.
bp: Zreformować agricultural subsidies to penalize nitrogen surplus per hectare. Gdy the nakładający się interes between livestock producers and feed importers is broken by internalizing the nitrogen externality, intensive livestock becomes unprofitable without subsidy.

Mandatory farm-level nitrogen and phosphorus balance disclosure. Denmark already has one of Europe's most detailed agricultural data systems — extending to mandatory public disclosure makes W computable.

Częściowo łamalne. Intensive livestock inherently concentrates nutrients beyond ecosystem absorption. However, Denmark's leadership in biogas from manure demonstrates zależność systemowa can be reduced through circular nutrient management.
a: Report nitrogen limit violations to Miljøstyrelsen (Danish Environmental Protection Agency)
Document animal welfare violations — report to Fødevarestyrelsen
Use Danish sygnalista law (Lov om beskyttelse af sygnalistae, 2021)
Danish Crown, Arla: Inwestować w plant-based protein alternatives
Wdrożyć nitrogen-neutral farming targets across supply chains
Przyjąć Scope 3 agricultural emisje reporting
Miljøministeriet: Tighten nitrogen quotas for marine ecosystem recovery
Landbrugsstyrelsen: Zreformować CAP eco-scheme payments to reward nitrogen-negative farming
Wdrożyć the 2021 agreement on green transition of Danish agriculture (55-65% emisje reduction by 2030)
Skontaktuj się ze swoim member of the Folketing by zażądać enforcement of agricultural nitrogen reduction targets
Support EU-wide mandatory nitrogen balance disclosure
Advocate for carbon border adjustment on imported animal feed from wylesianie regions
Naciskać na Baltic Sea Action Plan implementation through HELCOM
i: Miljøstyrelsen — responsible for środowiskowy regulation including agricultural emisje and water quality. Fødevarestyrelsen (Danish Veterinary and Food Administration) — oversees food safety and animal welfare. Danish Whistleblower Act (2021) — transposition of EU Directive 2019/1937.
Danish Crown — one of Europe's largest meat processors (farmer cooperative). Arla Foods — multinational dairy cooperative headquartered in Denmark. DLG Group — major agricultural input cooperative.

Miljøministeriet (Ministry of Environment) — środowiskowy policy including agricultural regulation. Landbrugsstyrelsen (Danish Agricultural Agency) — administers CAP payments. The 2021 green agriculture agreement is one of Europe's most ambitious.

Mandatory water quality monitoring and health-impact disclosure per mine. Publishing downstream contamination data makes W computable from górnictwo revenue.
Częściowo łamalne. Open-pit górnictwo disturbs landscapes. However, improved tailings management and water treatment can reduce zależność systemowa.

DZ.s: Major oil and gas producer ($269.3B PKB) with 22.46% combined oil and gas rents. Sonatrach is Africa's largest company. Economy heavily dependent on hydrocarbon exports (90%+ of export revenue). Rolnictwo na poziomie 14% PKB (primarily wheat and dates). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Algeria's oil production is declining from mature Hassi Messaoud and Hassi R'Mel fields. As domestic energy consumption grows (population of 45M+), the exportable surplus shrinks. Gdy production costs exceed export revenue minus domestic consumption, nakładający się interes w continued expansion breaks.
bp: Redirect hydrocarbon revenues to solar energy (Algeria has the Sahara — one of Earth's highest solar irradiance zones). Gdy solar electricity is cheaper than burning domestically-consumed gas, nakładający się interes w gas-fired power generation breaks.
Wdrożyć na złoże emisje disclosure for Sonatrach operations. Algeria's massive gas flaring (visible from satellite) makes środowiskowy damage measurable — publishing this data makes W computable.
Nie do złamania by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.

i: Sonatrach — Algeria's state oil and gas company, Africa's largest company by revenue. Sonatrach controls all upstream and downstream petroleum operations. Note: Algeria has limited press freedom and no comprehensive sygnalista protection. Independent reporting is constrained.
Sonatrach operates the world's longest natural gas pipelines (Transmed to Italy, MEG to Spain). Eni, TotalEnergies, Equinor, Occidental — major international partners in Algerian upstream operations.

ALNAFT (Agence Nationale pour la Valorisation des Ressources en Hydrocarbures) — the hydrocarbons regulatory agency managing licensing. CREG (Commission de Régulation de l'Électricité et du Gaz) — the electricity and gas regulatory commission. ARH (Autorité de Régulation des Hydrocarbures) — the hydrocarbons sector regulator.

Note: Algeria is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The Assemblée populaire nationale (407 members) and Conseil de la Nation (174 members) do not function as independent democratic institutions. International channels: OPEC membership, Mediterranean dialogue (Union for the Mediterranean), African Union, Arab League. Algeria's strategic gas supply position (supplier to Italy, Spain via pipeline) gives it leverage in energy transition negotiations.

EC.s: Oil-dependent gospodarka ($124.7B PKB) with 6.41% oil rents. PetroEcuador manages state interests. Extraordinary biodiversity (Galápagos, Amazon basin). The 2008 Constitution grants 'rights of nature' (Pachamama). Rolnictwo na poziomie 9.5% PKB (bananas, shrimp, cacao).

sectors.w: Ecuador's 2023 referendum voted to ban oil extraction in Yasuní National Park (one of the world's most biodiverse areas). This democratic decision to forgo extraction directly breaks the nakładający się interes. Extending this precedent to other sensitive areas accelerates the transition.
bp: Wdrożyć the Yasuní referendum result (ban extraction in ITT block) and extend the precedent to other ecologically sensitive areas. Gdy democratic decisions override extraction interests, the nakładający się interes breaks through civic action.

Mandate per-block środowiskowy impact disclosure for all PetroEcuador and private operator fields. Ecuador's środowiskowy data (Amazon wylesianie, water contamination from legacy Texaco/Chevron operations) makes W measurable.

i: MAATE (Ministerio del Ambiente, Agua y Transición Ecológica) — Ecuador's environment ministry. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman. Ecuador's 2008 Constitution (Articles 71-74) grants legally enforceable rights to nature (Pachamama), a global first.

EP PetroEcuador — the state oil company. PetroAmazonas EP — manages upstream operations in the Amazon basin. The Lago Agrio case (Chevron/Texaco) — one of the world's largest środowiskowy lawsuits over oil contamination in the Ecuadorian Amazon.
ARCERNNR (Agencia de Regulación y Control de Energía y Recursos Naturales No Renovables) — the energy and natural resources regulatory agency.

Asamblea Nacional del Ecuador — unicameral parliament (137 members). Contact through asambleanacional.gob.ec. Ecuador's rights of nature framework (2008 Constitution) and the 2023 Yasuní referendum are globally significant legal precedents for środowiskowy governance.

EE.s: Advanced digital gospodarka ($43.1B PKB) with unique oil shale dependence (0.96% oil rents from kukersite extraction). Services-dominant (65.7% PKB). EU and NATO member. World leader in e-governance. Oil shale power generation is Estonia's largest source of CO₂ emisje.

sectors.w: Estonia's oil shale sector is concentrated in Ida-Viru county (Eesti Energia/Enefit). EU ETS carbon costs make oil shale electricity the most expensive fossil option. Gdy carbon pricing fully applies, the nakładający się interes between shale operators and electricity consumers breaks.
bp: Full EU ETS alignment without compensation. Oil shale electricity already costs more than wind in the Baltic. Gdy subsidies and free allowances are eliminated, nakładający się interes w oil shale generation breaks — renewables are cheaper.
Mandatory na elektrownię lifecycle emisje and health-impact disclosure for oil shale processing. Estonia's detailed środowiskowy monitoring makes W computable.
Nie do złamania. Oil shale processing releases CO₂, particulate matter, and phenolic wastewater by physical and chemical process.

i: Keskkonnaamet (Environmental Board) — Estonia's środowiskowy enforcement and permitting authority. Keskkonnaministeerium (Ministry of the Environment) — oversees środowiskowy policy. Estonia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

Eesti Energia (Enefit) — the państwowe energy company and dominant oil shale operator. Enefit operates the Narva power plants (the largest oil shale power plants in the world) and oil shale processing facilities.

Konkurentsiamet (Competition Authority) — also serves as Estonia's regulator energii. Ida-Viru county hosts ~90% of Estonia's oil shale operations and faces significant economic transition challenges.

Riigikogu — Estonia's unicameral parliament (101 members). Contact through riigikogu.ee. Estonia's Climate Ambition target includes significant emisje reduction from the energy sector. EU Just Transition Fund — Estonia receives JTF funding for Ida-Viru transition.

EG.s: Largest Arab gospodarka by population ($389.1B PKB). Oil and gas rents at 5.04%. Major gas producer (Zohr field, Mediterranean). Rolnictwo na poziomie 13.7% PKB. High military expenditure. Hosted COP27. Suez Canal provides strategic global trade leverage.

sectors.w: Egypt's Zohr gas field (discovered 2015) transformed Egypt from gas importer to exporter. COP27 presidency created domestic pressure for emisje przejrzystość. Per-field emisje disclosure makes W computable.
bp: Redirect gas export revenue to solar energy development. Egypt's solar irradiance is among the world's highest. Gdy solar electricity undercuts gas-fired generation domestically, nakładający się interes w gas-for-domestic-power słabnie.

Wdrożyć na złoże emisje disclosure for Zohr and other major fields. Egypt's COP27 commitments create institutional pressure — making lifecycle emisje visible per unit of production makes W computable.

Whistleblower protections are minimal.

ET.s: Africa's second-most-populous country ($149.7B PKB). Agriculture dominates (34.8% PKB, primarily coffee, teff, livestock). Rapid industrialization drive (industrial parks). Major hydropower (GERD — Grand Ethiopian Renaissance Dam). Post-civil war recovery.

sectors.w: Ethiopia's agricultural expansion is the primary driver of wylesianie (fr=5.6% PKB equivalent in forest rents). Gdy per-farm środowiskowy data (tree cover, soil carbon) is linked to agricultural output, W staje się obliczalne.

Satellite-based monitoring of forest cover and degradacja gleb published at woreda level. Ethiopia's Green Legacy Initiative provides political commitment — mandatory monitoring data makes W computable.

Częściowo łamalne. Subsistence agriculture on degraded land inherently affects soil and water systems. However, Ethiopia's traditional conservation agriculture (terracing, agroforestry) can reduce zależność systemowa.

FI.s: Advanced Nordic gospodarka ($298.7B PKB) with strong forestry sector. Usługi na poziomie 62.2% PKB, manufacturing at 14.2%. High healthcare expenditure (10.47% PKB). Major pulp and paper producers (UPM, Stora Enso, Metsä Group). członek UE with robust środowiskowy regulation.

sectors.w: Finland's forestry-driven monoculture (pine/spruce plantations replacing natural forests) reduces biodiversity and degrades peatland carbon stocks. Gdy per-harvest biodiversity and carbon data is published alongside timber revenue, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Zreformować EU CAP and national forestry subsidies to reward biodiversity and carbon storage rather than timber volume. Gdy subsidies incentivize continuous-cover forestry over clear-cutting, nakładający się interes w plantation monoculture słabnie.

Mandatory per-harvest środowiskowy data (biodiversity indicators, soil carbon, water quality). Finland's Metsähallitus (state forest enterprise) already collects extensive data — making it publicly accessible makes W computable.

Częściowo łamalne. Timber plantation inherently reduces biodiversity compared to natural forest. However, continuous-cover forestry and extended rotation lengths can significantly reduce zależność systemowa.

i: ELY-keskus — regional authorities responsible for środowiskowy monitoring and enforcement. MMM (Maa- ja metsätalousministeriö) — the ministry responsible for agriculture and forestry policy. National Forest Strategy 2025 — Finland's strategic framework for forestry sector development. EU Nature Restoration Law — requires restoration of degraded ecosystems including forests.

Eduskunta (Parliament of Finland) — unicameral legislature with 200 members. Contact through eduskunta.fi. The Maa- ja metsätalousvaliokunta (Agriculture and Forestry Committee) handles forestry legislation. Finland's climate law targets carbon neutrality by 2035.

GA.s: Oil-dependent Central African gospodarka ($20.9B PKB) with 15.83% combined oil and gas rents. 88% forest cover — one of the world's most forested countries. Low population (2.4M). Military coup August 2023 ended the Bongo family's 55-year rule.

Debt crisis (2022 IMF bailout). Illegal artisanal gold górnictwo (galamsey) is a major środowiskowy crisis.

WRC (Water Resources Commission) — manages Ghana's water resources and monitors water quality. Minerals Commission — the regulatory body for the górnictwo sector, responsible for licensing and compliance monitoring.

Gold Fields — operates Tarkwa and Damang mines. Newmont — operates Ahafo and Akyem mines. AngloGold Ashanti — major gold górnictwo company with Ghanaian operations. Ghana is Africa's largest gold producer.

EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Ghana) — responsible for środowiskowy permitting, monitoring, and enforcement. Forestry Commission — manages Ghana's forest reserves, many of which are threatened by illegal górnictwo. EITI Ghana — Ghana has been EITI compliant since 2010.

Parliament of Ghana — unicameral legislature with 275 members. Contact through parliament.gh. Ghana is a presidential demokracja with peaceful transfers of power. Minamata Convention on Mercury — Ghana has ratified this treaty requiring phase-down of mercury use in artisanal gold górnictwo.

GN.s: Resource-rich West African gospodarka ($25B PKB) with massive bauxite reserves (world's largest — 7.4B tons). Rolnictwo na poziomie 31% PKB. Military junta since 2021 coup. Guinea supplies ~25% of global bauxite (the ore used to produce aluminum).

sectors.w: Guinea's bauxite górnictwo displaces communities and contaminates water sources. As aluminum buyers face ESG pressure (EU CSRD, Apple/Tesla supply chain requirements), making na kopalnię środowiskowy data visible breaks system independence.
bp: International supply chain due diligence (EU CSDDD) requiring środowiskowy and human rights compliance for bauxite. Gdy buyers must verify mine-level conditions, nakładający się interes w low-cost, unregulated extraction słabnie.
Per-mine środowiskowy and community impact disclosure through EITI and supply chain traceability. Gdy downstream manufacturers can see the welfare cost per ton of bauxite, W staje się obliczalne.
Częściowo łamalne. Open-pit bauxite górnictwo inherently disturbs landscapes. However, progressive rehabilitation and dust suppression can reduce zależność systemowa.
a: Report środowiskowy violations to international monitoring organizations (Human Rights Watch, Inclusive Opracowaćment International)
Document community displacement — report through international accountability mechanisms
Report through górnictwo company compliance channels (Rio Tinto, Alcoa, Emirates Global Aluminium)
CBG (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinée), SMB (Société Minière de Boké): Wdrożyć community resettlement standards per IFC Performance Standard 5
Przyjąć ASI (Aluminium Stewardship Initiative) certification
Inwestować w progressive rehabilitation of mined areas
Ministry of Mines: Egzekwować 2011 Mining Code środowiskowy provisions
CPDM (Centre de Promotion et de Développement Minier): Wzmocnić środowiskowy monitoring capacity
EITI Guinea: Expand reporting to środowiskowy and community data
Wspierać przez ECOWAS for return to democratic governance and strengthened górnictwo regulation
Support EU CSDDD implementation requiring due diligence for bauxite imports from Guinea
Naciskać na ASI certification as condition for international bauxite purchases
Support international accountability mechanisms for górnictwo-affected communities
i: Note: Guinea is under military rule (CNRD — Comité National du Rassemblement et du Développement) since September 2021. Independent społeczeństwo obywatelskie operates under severe constraints. Bureau Guinéen des Études et Évaluations Environnementales (BGEEE) — środowiskowy assessment authority. International monitoring: Human Rights Watch and Inclusive Opracowaćment International have documented impacts of bauxite górnictwo on Guinean communities.

CBG (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinée) — JV of Alcoa, Rio Tinto, and Dadco, one of the world's largest bauxite producers. SMB (Société Minière de Boké) — Chinese-backed consortium (includes Winning International, Shandong Weiqiao). GAC (Guinea Alumina Corporation) — Emirates Global Aluminium subsidiary. ASI (Aluminium Stewardship Initiative) — the industry sustainability standard for the aluminum value chain.

Ministère des Mines et de la Géologie — oversees górnictwo policy and licensing. Code Minier (2011, revised 2013) — Guinea's górnictwo code establishing środowiskowy obligations. EITI Guinea — Guinea has been EITI compliant, publishing reports on górnictwo revenues.

Note: Guinea's democratic institutions are suspended under military rule. The Conseil National de la Transition (CNT) serves as a transitional legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Guinea suspended), African Union, international górnictwo company home-country oversight (UK, Canada, UAE, China). EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive (CSDDD) — will require EU companies to address human rights and środowiskowy impacts in their supply chains.

GQ.s: Small petrostate ($12.8B PKB) with 21.57% combined oil and gas rents. One of Africa's highest per-capita PKBs but extreme inequality. Authoritarian rule (Obiang family since 1979 — world's longest-serving head of state). Oil production declining from mature fields.

sectors.w: Equatorial Guinea's oil production has declined ~75% from peak. As fields deplete, the nakładający się interes between operators and government revenue słabnie. Without new discoveries, the economic case for diversification becomes unavoidable.
bp: Economic diversification as oil depletes. Gdy production revenue falls below government operating costs, nakładający się interes w continued extraction from depleting fields breaks — alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-field emisje disclosure through international operator reporting (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil). Making środowiskowy costs visible makes W computable.
Nie do złamania by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report through international operator compliance channels (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil)
Document środowiskowy violations to international NGOs
Report corruption to US DOJ (several Obiang family members have faced kleptocracy investigations)
ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil: Apply global środowiskowy standards to EG operations
Report Scope 1-3 emisje for EG operations in global ESG disclosures
Wdrożyć community development programs

Wzmocnić środowiskowy standards for offshore operations
BEAC: Improve fiscal przejrzystość for hydrocarbon revenues
Support international anti-kleptocracy enforcement for misappropriated oil revenues
Wspierać przez CEMAC for regional przejrzystość standards
Naciskać na re-engagement with EITI przejrzystość requirements
Support international mechanisms for asset recovery and repatriation of stolen oil revenues
i: Note: Equatorial Guinea is one of the world's most autorytarny states. No independent media, społeczeństwo obywatelskie, or labor organizations exist. EG LNG (Equatorial Guinea LNG Holdings) — operates the LNG processing plant. International engagement: US Department of Justice Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Initiative has investigated Obiang family assets. Transparency International consistently ranks Equatorial Guinea among the most corrupt countries.
ExxonMobil — the largest oil operator in Equatorial Guinea. Marathon Oil — operates in offshore blocks. GEPetrol — the state national oil company.

Ministry of Mines and Hydrocarbons — oversees oil and gas operations. Note: Equatorial Guinea was suspended from EITI in 2010 for insufficient progress on przejrzystość. BEAC (central bank of CEMAC zone) provides limited macroeconomic oversight.

Note: Equatorial Guinea under President Obiang (in power since 1979) has no democratic institutions. The Cámara de Representantes del Pueblo and Senate are rubber-stamp bodies. International channels: CEMAC, African Union, UN Human Rights Council. Several countries (US, France, Switzerland) have pursued legal action against Obiang family members for corruption and money laundering.

GR.s: EU gospodarka ($256.2B PKB) with dominant services sector (68% PKB, tourism-heavy). Low resource extraction. Post-debt-crisis recovery. Major shipping industry (Greek-owned fleet is the world's largest). Rolnictwo na poziomie 3.8% PKB (olives, wine).

sectors.w: Greece's Mediterranean diet is being displaced by UPF consumption, contributing to rising obesity (Greece has one of Europe's highest childhood obesity rates). Gdy diet-related healthcare costs are published per product category through EOPYY health insurance data, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Wdrożyć front-of-pack health labelling to make welfare costs visible to consumers. Gdy UPF health costs are visible at point of sale, the nakładający się interes between processors and retailers in high-margin UPF słabnie.

EOPYY (National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) publication of diet-attributable disease costs per food category. Greece's national health system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Zreformowaćulation mandates can reduce zależność systemowa.

EFET: Wzmocnić enforcement of marketing claims
EOPYY: Publish diet-related health expenditure data

Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
Advocate for UNESCO Intangible Heritage protection of Mediterranean diet through policy measures
Naciskać na WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions
i: EFET (ΕΦΕΤ — Ενιαίος Φορέας Ελέγχου Τροφίμων / Hellenic Food Authority) — Greece's food safety authority. Greece transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

SEVT (Σύνδεσμος Ελληνικών Βιομηχανιών Τροφίμων / Federation of Hellenic Food Industries) — the food industry trade association. Greece's traditional food sector (olive oil, dairy, honey) provides a competitive alternative to UPF.

Ministry of Health — oversees health policy. EOPYY (Εθνικός Οργανισμός Παροχής Υπηρεσιών Υγείας / National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) — the national health insurer managing healthcare expenditure data.
Βουλή των Ελλήνων (Hellenic Parliament) — unicameral legislature with 300 members. Contact through hellenicparliament.gr. Greece is a parlamentarny demokracja and członek UE.

GT.s: Central American gospodarka ($113.2B PKB) with agriculture at 9.8% PKB (coffee, sugar, palm oil). Mining at 1.12% PKB (gold, silver — Marlin mine controversy). High inequality and indigenous population (40%+). Remittances significant (~18% of PKB).

sectors.w: Guatemala's palm oil expansion into Petén and Alta Verapaz drives wylesianie and displaces indigenous communities. Gdy per-farm wylesianie data is linked to palm oil exports (EUDR compliance), W staje się obliczalne.
bp: EU Deforestation Regulation compliance requiring farm-level traceability. Gdy palm oil exports must prove zero-wylesianie origin, nakładający się interes w clearing forest for plantations breaks.

Mandatory per-farm środowiskowy data (tree cover, water use, pesticide application). Guatemala's CONAP (National Council for Protected Areas) can provide monitoring data — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. However, agroforestry integration and RSPO certification can reduce zależność systemowa.

Document indigenous land rights violations — report to PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos)
Report pesticide violations to MAGA (Ministry of Agriculture)

CONAP: Egzekwować protected area boundaries against agricultural encroachment

Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
Naciskać na EUDR compliance support for small-scale farmers
i: CONAP (Consejo Nacional de Áreas Protegidas) — manages Guatemala's protected areas. INAB (Instituto Nacional de Bosques) — the national forest institute. PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos) — the national human rights ombudsman. Guatemala has significant challenges with środowiskowy defender safety.

REPSA (Reforestadora de Palma del Petén) — major palm oil producer. GREPALMA (Gremial de Palmicultores de Guatemala) — the palm oil producers' association. RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable Olej palmowy) — the international certification standard.
MARN (Ministerio de Ambiente y Recursos Naturales) — Guatemala's environment ministry. MAGA (Ministerio de Agricultura, Ganadería y Alimentación) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso de la República de Guatemala — unicameral legislature with 160 members. Guatemala has ratified ILO Convention 169 on indigenous peoples' rights. The Inter-American Court of Human Rights has issued rulings on indigenous land rights in Guatemala.

GY.s: Fastest-growing gospodarka globally ($24.7B PKB, up from $5.5B in 2019) due to massive offshore oil discoveries (Stabroek block). Renty naftowe at 22.08%, górnictwo at 9.38% (gold, bauxite). Small population (800K). At risk of 'resource curse' — extraordinary PST exposure from rapid petro-development.

sectors.w: Guyana's 2016 production sharing agreement with ExxonMobil has been widely criticized for giving the government only 2% royalty + 50% profit oil (after cost recovery). Gdy the full fiscal terms and środowiskowy costs are disclosed and understood, W staje się obliczalne from production data.
bp: Renegotiate the Stabroek PSA fiscal terms to capture a fair share of petroleum wealth. Gdy Guyana's government share approaches international norms (60-80% government take), nakładający się interes w an extractive-favorable contract słabnie.
Mandatory na złoże emisje disclosure and środowiskowy monitoring for all Stabroek block operations. ExxonMobil already reports global emisje — extending to na złoże Guyana data makes W computable.
Nie do złamania by policy alone. Offshore oil production and combustion release CO₂.
a: Report środowiskowy violations to EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana)
Document compliance gaps in Stabroek operations — report through ExxonMobil compliance channels
Report fiscal irregularities to the Audit Office of Guyana
ExxonMobil, Hess, CNOOC (Stabroek partners): Wdrożyć na złoże emisje disclosure for Guyana operations
Przyjąć zero-flaring targets
Inwestować w oil spill response capacity (current capacity is minimal for deepwater operations)
EPA: Wzmocnić środowiskowy monitoring capacity for offshore operations
Ministry of Natural Resources: Commission independent review of Stabroek PSA terms
Natural Resource Fund Board: Wdrożyć transparent investment and withdrawal rules
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Member of Parliament in the National Assembly by zażądać independent review of Stabroek PSA fiscal terms
Support establishment of a properly resourced Petroleum Commission as independent regulator
Advocate for Natural Resource Fund przejrzystość aligned with Santiago Principles for sovereign wealth funds
Naciskać na Norwegian-style petroleum governance model with high government take and transparent wealth fund management
i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana) — responsible for środowiskowy permitting and monitoring of oil and gas operations. Ministry of Natural Resources — oversees petroleum policy. Audit Office of Guyana — conducts financial audits of government revenue management. Note: Guyana's regulatory capacity is severely under-resourced relative to the scale of oil development.

ExxonMobil (45%), Hess (30%), CNOOC (25%) — the Stabroek block partnership. Production began in 2019 and is expected to reach 1.2 million bpd by 2027. The Stabroek Production Sharing Agreement (2016) — governs fiscal terms. The Natural Resource Fund — Guyana's sovereign wealth fund established in 2019 to manage oil revenues.
Natural Resource Fund Act (2021) — governs the sovereign wealth fund. The Petroleum Commission (planned) — intended to serve as the independent petroleum regulator, but not yet fully established.

National Assembly of Guyana — unicameral legislature with 65 members. Guyana is a cooperative republic with Westminster-style parlamentarny demokracja. The Natural Resource Governance Institute (NRGI) provides technical assistance on petroleum governance. CARICOM — provides regional coordination.

HK.s: Global financial center ($406.9B PKB) with 91.8% services. Major banking and securities hub. Under Chinese sovereignty since 1997 with eroding autonomy. Significant financial intermediation — Hong Kong Stock Exchange is 5th-largest globally by market cap.

sectors.w: Hong Kong intermediates massive capital flows including fossil fuel financing. Gdy Scope 3 financed emisje are disclosed per financial institution, W staje się obliczalne from financial transaction data.
bp: Mandatory financed emisje disclosure for all HKEX-listed financial institutions. Gdy banks must disclose the emisje their lending supports, nakładający się interes w fossil fuel financing słabnie — ESG-aware investors reallocate.
HKMA Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group implementation. Making climate risk visible in financial products makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Financial intermediation can relocate. But Hong Kong's infrastructure and China market access create switching costs.
a: Report greenwashing to SFC (Securities and Futures Commission)
Document ESG disclosure violations — report to HKEX listing division
Report through internal bank compliance channels
Przyjąć TCFD-aligned disclosure across all operations
Set financed emisje reduction targets
Integrate climate risk into lending decisions
HKMA: Mandate climate stress testing for all authorized institutions
SFC: Egzekwować enhanced ESG disclosure for listed companies
HKEX: Wzmocnić climate-related listing requirements
Wspierać przez IOSCO for global securities regulator coordination on climate disclosure
Support ISSB sustainability reporting standards adoption in Hong Kong
Naciskać na Network for Greening the Financial System (NGFS) recommendations implementation
Leverage Hong Kong's role as a Belt and Road financing hub to require climate standards
i: SFC (Securities and Futures Commission) — regulates securities, futures markets, and listed companies. HKEX (Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing) — operates the stock exchange and sets listing rules including ESG disclosure requirements. HKMA (Hong Kong Monetary Authority) — the de facto central bank. Note: Under the National Security Law (2020), civil liberties are constrained.

Major banks in Hong Kong: HSBC, Standard Chartered, Bank of China (Hong Kong), Hang Seng Bank. Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group — coordinates climate finance policy across HKMA, SFC, and other regulators.
HKMA — supervises 160+ licensed banks. The HKMA's Climate Risk Management Supervisory Policy Manual (2021) sets expectations for banks' climate risk management.

Note: Hong Kong's Legislative Council (90 members) is not freely elected under the 2021 electoral reform. International engagement operates through financial regulatory cooperation (IOSCO, BIS, NGFS) and Hong Kong's role as an international financial center.

HN.s: Lower-middle-income gospodarka ($37.1B PKB) with agriculture at 11.2% PKB (coffee, palm oil, bananas). Produkcja na poziomie 14.9% (maquiladora sector). Climate-vulnerable — Hurricane Mitch (1998) and Eta/Iota (2020). High emigration. Environmental defenders face severe threats.

sectors.w: Honduras's palm oil expansion drives wylesianie in the Aguán Valley and Mosquitia region. EUDR compliance will require farm-level traceability — when wylesianie is linked to specific supply chains, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-wylesianie traceability for palm oil exports. Gdy buyers must verify origin, nakładający się interes w forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Satellite-based wylesianie monitoring linked to agricultural export data. ICF (Forest Conservation Institute) data makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. RSPO certification and agroforestry can reduce zależność systemowa.
a: Report illegal wylesianie to ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal)
Document land rights violations — report to CONADEH (Comisionado Nacional de los Derechos Humanos)

i: ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal) — responsible for forest management and conservation. CONADEH — the national human rights commissioner. Note: Honduras is one of the most dangerous countries for środowiskowy defenders — Global Witness documents multiple killings annually.

Corporación Dinant — Honduras's largest palm oil producer (implicated in Aguán Valley land conflicts). Jaremar — another major palm oil company. IFC (International Finance Corporation) — has faced accountability complaints regarding investments in Honduran palm oil.
MiAmbiente+ (Secretaría de Recursos Naturales y Ambiente) — Honduras's environment ministry. SAG (Secretaría de Agricultura y Ganadería) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso Nacional de Honduras — unicameral legislature with 128 members. Honduras is a presidential demokracja. SICA (Sistema de la Integración Centroamericana) — the Central American integration system.

HR.s: EU and Eurozone member ($93B PKB) with dominant services sector (60.8% PKB, tourism-heavy). Small oil sector (INA, partially owned by MOL). Rolnictwo na poziomie 2.9% PKB. Joined the euro and Schengen in 2023.

sectors.w: Croatia's EU-integrated health insurance system (HZZO) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs per product category makes W computable from retail sales data.
bp: Wdrożyć EU front-of-pack health labelling. Makes welfare costs visible to consumers.
HZZO publication of diet-attributable healthcare cost data. Croatia's universal health insurance generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Zreformowaćulation mandates reduce zależność systemowa.

i: HAH (Hrvatska agencija za hranu / Croatian Food Agency) — food safety authority. AZTN (Agencija za zaštitu tržišnog natjecanja) — competition authority. Croatia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.
Podravka, Kraš — major Croatian food companies. Agrokor/Fortenova Group — the largest food and retail conglomerate in Southeast Europe.
HZZO (Hrvatski zavod za zdravstveno osiguranje) — Croatia's health insurance fund. Ministry of Health oversees nutrition policy.
Hrvatski sabor (Croatian Parliament) — unicameral, 151 members. Contact through sabor.hr. Croatia is an EU and Eurozone member.

HT.s: Fragile state ($25.2B PKB) — Western Hemisphere's poorest country. Rolnictwo na poziomie 15.9% PKB (coffee, mangoes, cocoa). Extreme wylesianie (2% forest cover remaining). Gang violence and political instability. Produkcja na poziomie 26.2% PKB (garment assembly).

sectors.w: Haiti's near-total wylesianie (98% forest loss) means any remaining agriculture operates on severely degraded land. The zależność systemowa is already partially broken — Haiti has experienced the endpoint of wylesianie-driven agricultural collapse. Reforestation is the intervention.
bp: Zreformować agricultural support to incentivize tree planting and agroforestry. Gdy hillside farmers receive more support for tree crops (coffee, cocoa, fruit) than annual crops on degraded slopes, nakładający się interes w continued wylesianie breaks.
Satellite monitoring of remaining forest cover and soil erosion published at commune level. Making degradation visible makes W computable.

Extreme zależność systemowa — 98% forest loss means agricultural activity on degraded slopes directly causes erosion, flooding, and further land degradation. Reforestation is the only path to reducing zależność systemowa.

Report illegal charcoal production to MDE (Ministry of Environment)
Engage international development organizations

Support international reforestation and land restoration programs for Haiti
Wspierać przez CARICOM for regional środowiskowy support
Naciskać na debt-for-nature swaps to finance reforestation
Support Haitian diaspora organizations working on środowiskowy restoration
i: MDE (Ministère de l'Environnement) — the environment ministry, severely under-resourced. Note: Haiti's state institutions are largely non-functional due to the ongoing security and governance crisis. International organizations (UN, USAID, EU) provide most środowiskowy programming.
Haiti's private sector is small. The Chambre de Commerce d'Haïti coordinates business activities. International NGOs (Partners in Health, Trees for the Future) implement many development programs.

MARNDR (Ministère de l'Agriculture, des Ressources Naturelles et du Développement Rural) — the agriculture ministry. ONEV (Observatoire National de l'Environnement et de la Vulnérabilité) — środowiskowy monitoring.

Note: Haiti's democratic institutions are non-functional — no elected parliament since 2023, no elected president. Transitional governance is underway. International channels: UN Integrated Office in Haiti (BINUH), CARICOM, OAS, Haitian diaspora organizations.

HU.s: członek UE ($222.7B PKB) with strong manufacturing (15.8% PKB, automotive-focused). Usługi na poziomie 59.5% PKB. Small oil and gas sector (MOL Group). Rolnictwo na poziomie 2.7% PKB. Democratic backsliding under Orbán government has strained EU relations.

sectors.w: Hungary has one of Europe's highest obesity rates and introduced a 'chip tax' (NETA — népegészségügyi termékadó) on UPF in 2011. Gdy health insurance data (NEAK) links diet to healthcare costs per product category, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Wzmocnić the NETA tax and extend to broader UPF categories. Hungary's pioneering public health product tax słabnie nakładający się interes w high-margin UPF by internalizing health costs.
NEAK publication of diet-attributable healthcare expenditure. Hungary's health insurance system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Zreformowaćulation targets can reduce zależność systemowa.

Naciskać na EU cohesion funds for public health nutrition programs
i: NÉBIH (Nemzeti Élelmiszerlánc-biztonsági Hivatal) — Hungary's food chain safety authority. GVH (Gazdasági Versenyhivatal) — competition authority enforcing fair advertising. Hungary transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive.
Major companies: Bonafarm Group, Pick Szeged. International companies operating in Hungary: Nestlé, Coca-Cola, PepsiCo.

NETA (népegészségügyi termékadó) — Hungary's public health product tax, one of the world's first UPF taxes, introduced 2011. NEAK (Nemzeti Egészségbiztosítási Alapkezelő) — national health insurance fund.
Országgyűlés (National Assembly of Hungary) — unicameral parliament, 199 members. Contact through parlament.hu.

ID.s: G20 gospodarka ($1,396.3B PKB). World's largest palm oil producer (palm oil=~3.5% PKB). Significant coal (1.22% rents), oil/gas (1.61%), and górnictwo (1.91%). Massive archipelago with extraordinary biodiversity. Palm oil expansion has driven catastrophic wylesianie.

sectors.w: Indonesia produces ~60% of global palm oil. EUDR compliance will require zero-wylesianie traceability to plantation level. Gdy na elektrownięation forest loss data is linked to palm oil transactions, W staje się obliczalne from commodity prices.
bp: EUDR compliance forcing zero-wylesianie supply chain traceability. Gdy international buyers require verified wylesianie-free palm oil, nakładający się interes w clearing forest for new plantations breaks — productivity improvement on existing land becomes the viable model.

Mandatory per-concession środowiskowy data (fire occurrence, peat depth, biodiversity surveys) linked to ISPO certification. Indonesia's KLHK already monitors wylesianie by satellite — publishing per-company data makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, smallholder agroforestry and yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce pressure for new forest conversion.

i: KLHK (Kementerian Lingkungan Hidup dan Kehutanan) — the environment and forestry ministry, responsible for forest management, środowiskowy regulation, and fire prevention. Komnas HAM (Komisi Nasional Hak Asasi Manusia) — the national human rights commission. WALHI (Wahana Lingkungan Hidup Indonesia / Friends of the Earth Indonesia) — the largest środowiskowy NGO.

Wilmar International — the world's largest palm oil trader. Golden Agri-Resources (Sinar Mas Group) — one of the largest palm oil producers. GAPKI (Gabungan Pengusaha Kelapa Sawit Indonesia) — the Indonesian palm oil association. RSPO and ISPO (Indonesian Sustainable Olej palmowy) — certification standards.

One Map Policy (Kebijakan Satu Peta) — Indonesia's initiative to create a single, authoritative map of land use and forest cover to resolve overlapping concessions. BPDPKS (Badan Pengelola Dana Perkebunan Kelapa Sawit) — the palm oil plantation fund managing the CPO export levy.

DPR (Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat / People's Representative Council) — lower house, 580 members. DPD (Dewan Perwakilan Daerah / Regional Representative Council) — upper house, 136 members. Contact through dpr.go.id. Indonesia is a presidential demokracja and the world's third-largest demokracja.

IE.s: High-income EU gospodarka ($609.2B PKB, inflated by multinational profit booking). Produkcja na poziomie 29.6% PKB (pharma, tech). Major corporate tax hub. Rolnictwo na poziomie 1% PKB but intensive dairy farming with significant methane emisje. Usługi na poziomie 60.6% PKB.

sectors.w: Ireland's dairy herd expansion post-milk-quota-abolition (2015) increased methane emisje by 20%+. Gdy per-farm greenhouse gas data is published alongside output, W staje się obliczalne from agricultural production data.
bp: Zreformować CAP subsidies from production-linked to środowiskowy outcome-linked. Gdy dairy expansion no longer receives per-cow support, nakładający się interes w herd growth słabnie.
Mandatory per-farm greenhouse gas balance disclosure. Ireland's Bord Bia Origin Green program collects data — making it publicly verifiable makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Ruminant digestion produces methane by biological process. Feed additives (e.g., 3-NOP) can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane.

i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency) — Ireland's środowiskowy regulator. Protected Disclosures Act 2014 (amended 2022) — Ireland's sygnalista protection law, one of the strongest in Europe.

Kerry Group — major food ingredients company. Glanbia — dairy and nutrition company. Ornua (formerly Irish Dairy Board) — manages Kerrygold brand. Teagasc — the agriculture and food development authority providing research and extension.
DAFM (Department of Agriculture, Food and the Marine) — Ireland's agriculture ministry. Bord Bia (Irish Food Board) — the food marketing agency running the Origin Green sustainability program.

Oireachtas (Parliament of Ireland) — bicameral: Dáil Éireann (160 TDs) and Seanad Éireann (60 Senators). Contact through oireachtas.ie. Ireland's Climate Action and Low Carbon Opracowaćment Act (2021) sets legally binding emisje budgets.

IL.s: High-tech gospodarka ($540.4B PKB) with dominant services (72.5% PKB). High military expenditure (8.78% PKB). Gas production from Leviathan and Tamar fields (0.43% gas rents). Major tech sector — 'Startup Nation.' Water management leader (desalination, drip irrigation).

sectors.w: Israel's Mediterranean gas fields (Leviathan, Tamar) were discovered in 2009-2010. Per-field emisje disclosure through ISA (Israel Securities Authority) listed company requirements makes W computable from production data.
bp: Export gas to replace coal in Egypt and Jordan — net emisje benefit if displacing higher-carbon sources. But this locks in gas infrastructure. Gdy renewable alternatives become cheaper for regional electricity, the nakładający się interes słabnie.
Mandatory na złoże emisje disclosure for Leviathan and Tamar operators. ISA reporting requirements provide the mechanism to make W computable.
Nie do złamania by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.

i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — Israel's organ ochrony środowiska. ISA (Israel Securities Authority) — regulates disclosure for listed companies including Delek Group. Israel has sygnalista protections under the Protection of Workers (Exposure of Offenses) Law, 1997.
NewMed Energy — operates Leviathan field. Chevron — acquired Noble Energy's interest in Tamar. Israel Natural Gas Lines (INGL) — the państwowe gas transmission company.

Petroleum Commissioner — within the Ministry of Energy, oversees oil and gas licensing. Electricity Authority — the independent electricity regulator. Israel's Electricity Market Zreformować aims to increase competition and renewable penetration.

Knesset (כנסת) — Israel's unicameral parliament, 120 members. Contact through knesset.gov.il. Israel is an OECD member. EMGF (Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum) — regional organization for gas market coordination.

IQ.s: Oil-dependent gospodarka ($279.6B PKB) with 43.45% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. OPEC member producing ~4.5M bpd. Massive gas flaring (Iraq flares more gas than almost any other country). Post-conflict reconstruction ongoing.

sectors.w: Iraq flares $2.5B+ worth of associated gas annually. Capturing and monetizing flared gas makes W computable — the flared gas represents pure waste visible from satellite (World Bank GGFR data).
bp: Gas capture and monetization. Iraq wastes $2.5B/year in flared gas. Gdy gas capture infrastructure is built, nakładający się interes w flaring (which is cheaper short-term than processing) breaks as captured gas generates revenue.
Satellite-based flare monitoring (VIIRS nightfire data) already makes gas flaring volumes visible globally. Linking na złoże flaring data to production revenue makes W computable.
Nie do złamania. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

Ministry of Oil — oversees all petroleum operations and manages Technical Service Contracts (TSCs) with international operators. Ministry of Environment — responsible for środowiskowy policy but severely under-resourced.

Note: Iraq is a parlamentarny demokracja but governance is fragmented among sectarian and ethnic power blocs. Council of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 329 members). International channels: OPEC membership, World Bank, UNAMI (UN Assistance Mission for Iraq), GGFR.

IR.s: Major oil and gas producer ($475.3B PKB) with 27.08% combined rents. World's second-largest natural gas reserves (after Russia). Under comprehensive international sankcje. Produkcja na poziomie 20.6% PKB. Theocratic governance limits civic channels.

sectors.w: International sankcje have already weakened the nakładający się interes by restricting Iran's ability to monetize oil exports at market price. Gdy sankcje enforcement eliminates the discount market, Iran's economic model requires diversification.
bp: Sanctions enforcement. Gdy Iran cannot sell oil at market prices, the economic case for energia odnawialna investment (Iran has excellent solar potential) strengthens. The nakładający się interes in oil dependence breaks when export revenues are structurally constrained.
Per-field środowiskowy data is largely unavailable due to sankcje-related opacity. International satellite monitoring (methane detection) provides external data to estimate W.

i: DoE (سازمان حفاظت محیط زیست / Department of Environment) — Iran's organ ochrony środowiska, which has limited enforcement power. NIOC (National Iranian Oil Company) — the state oil company. Note: Iran has no effective sygnalista protection. Civil society is severely constrained.

NIOC — controls all upstream oil and gas operations. NIGC (National Iranian Gas Company) — manages gas production and distribution. Pars Oil and Gas Company — manages South Pars/North Dome gas field operations.

Ministry of Petroleum — oversees oil and gas policy. Iran's Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency Organization (SATBA) — responsible for energia odnawialna development. Iran has installed some solar and wind capacity but it remains a tiny fraction of energy supply.

Note: Iran is a theocratic republic. The Islamic Consultative Assembly (Majles, 290 members) has limited power relative to the Supreme Leader and Guardian Council. International channels: OPEC, UNFCCC (Iran signed but did not ratify Paris Agreement), UN Environment Programme.

IS.s: Small advanced gospodarka ($33.3B PKB) with 100% renewable electricity (geothermal and hydro). Rybołówstwo are 5% of PKB and the largest PST exposure — Iceland's fisheries management is globally studied but faces sustainability challenges from ocean warming.

sectors.w: Iceland's ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system generates detailed per-vessel catch data. Gdy ecosystem health metrics (stock assessments, bycatch, seabed impact) are published alongside fishing revenue, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Zreformować ITQ allocations to include ecosystem impact costs. Gdy quota holders pay for bycatch and seabed damage, nakładający się interes w maximum extraction słabnie.

Alþingi (Althing) — Iceland's unicameral parliament, 63 members, one of the world's oldest legislatures (established 930 CE). Contact through althingi.is. NEAFC — the regional fisheries management organization for the Northeast Atlantic.

JG.s: British Crown Dependencies ($12.5B PKB) — Jersey and Guernsey. Major offshore financial centers (91.2% services). Financial services dominate with significant fund administration and trust structures. Not part of the UK or EU but closely aligned with UK regulatory standards.

sectors.w: Channel Islands' financial services facilitate global capital flows with lower przejrzystość than UK mainland. Gdy beneficial ownership data and tax przejrzystość information are published, W staje się obliczalne from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full beneficial ownership przejrzystość aligned with UK Economic Crime Act requirements. Gdy financial secrecy is eliminated, the nakładający się interes between service providers and opacity-seeking clients słabnie.
Mandatory CRS (Common Reporting Standard) enhanced reporting. Publishing aggregate capital flow data makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Financial intermediation can relocate but the Channel Islands' proximity to London and established legal infrastructure create switching costs.

i: JFSC (Jersey Usługi Finansowe Commission) — Jersey's financial regulator. GFSC (Guernsey Usługi Finansowe Commission) — Guernsey's financial regulator. JFIU / FIS — financial intelligence units.
Channel Islands host operations of major international banks and fund administrators. Jersey Finance and Guernsey Finance promote the financial services sectors.
JFSC — Jersey's integrated financial regulator. GFSC — Guernsey's equivalent. Both crown dependencies have their own regulatory frameworks but coordinate closely with UK authorities.

States of Jersey (49 members) and States of Guernsey (38 members) — the insular legislatures. Constitutional relationship with UK means UK Parliament can legislate for the Crown Dependencies on international obligations.

JM.s: Caribbean island gospodarka ($22B PKB) with tourism and services dominant (60% PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 8% PKB. Bauxite/alumina industry historically significant but declining. Climate-vulnerable. High debt burden (IMF structural adjustment).

bp: Zreformować agricultural subsidies toward crop diversification and agroforestry. Gdy farmers receive support for diverse crops rather than monoculture sugar, the nakładający się interes breaks.
Publish watershed health and soil erosion data linked to agricultural practices. NEPA collects środowiskowy data — linking to farming output makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Tropical monoculture inherently degrades soil. Jamaica's Blue Mountain coffee model shows premium diversification is viable.

Parliament of Jamaica — bicameral: House of Representatives (63 members) and Senate (21 appointed). Jamaica is a Westminster-style parlamentarny demokracja.

JO.s: Water-scarce Middle Eastern gospodarka ($53.4B PKB) with limited natural resources. Usługi na poziomie 60.4% PKB. High military expenditure (4.8% PKB). Produkcja na poziomie 17.7% (phosphate, potash, pharmaceuticals). Among the world's most water-stressed countries.

sectors.w: Jordan's phosphate and potash górnictwo (Arab Potash Company, Jordan Phosphate Mines Company) depletes Dead Sea water levels and contaminates groundwater. Gdy środowiskowy cost data is published alongside górnictwo revenue, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Internalize środowiskowy costs (Dead Sea decline, water depletion) into górnictwo operations through środowiskowy levies. Gdy miners pay for water extraction in one of Earth's most water-stressed countries, nakładający się interes w water-intensive extraction słabnie.
Publish na kopalnię water consumption and Dead Sea level impact data. Jordan's water authority collects data — linking to górnictwo output makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Mining inherently uses water. However, water recycling and dry processing can reduce per-ton water consumption.

i: Ministry of Environment — Jordan's organ ochrony środowiska. WAJ (Water Authority of Jordan) — manages the country's severely limited water resources. Jordan has approximately 60 cubic meters of renewable water per capita — far below the 500 m³ threshold for absolute water scarcity.
JPMC — one of the world's largest phosphate producers. APC (Arab Potash Company) — extracts potash from the Dead Sea.
Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources — oversees górnictwo policy. NRA (Natural Resources Authority) — the górnictwo regulatory body.

Majlis al-Umma (Parliament of Jordan) — bicameral: Majlis al-Nuwab (House of Representatives, 130 members, elected) and Majlis al-Ayan (Senate, 65 appointed). Jordan is a monarchia konstytucyjna with limited democratic space.

KE.s: East Africa's largest gospodarka ($120.3B PKB) with agriculture at 22.5% PKB (tea, coffee, horticulture). Usługi na poziomie 55.3%. 90%+ renewable electricity (geothermal, hydro). Vibrant tech sector (M-Pesa). Wildlife tourism. Climate-vulnerable (drought cycles).

sectors.w: Kenya's tea and horticulture sectors use intensive farming on shrinking arable land. Gdy per-farm water and pesticide data is published alongside export revenue, W staje się obliczalne. Kenya's M-Pesa infrastructure enables farm-level data collection.
bp: Zreformować agricultural export incentives to require środowiskowy certification. Gdy tea and flower exports must demonstrate sustainable water and pesticide use, nakładający się interes w intensive monoculture słabnie.
Farm-level środowiskowy data collection using mobile technology (Kenya's digital infrastructure is advanced). Making water and chemical use visible per farm makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Intensive horticulture inherently affects water and soil systems. However, Kenya's organic agriculture sector is growing and agroforestry can reduce zależność systemowa.

i: NEMA (National Environment Management Authority) — Kenya's środowiskowy regulator, responsible for środowiskowy impact assessments, pollution control, and enforcement. Ministry of Agriculture, Livestock, Rybołówstwo and Cooperatives — oversees agricultural policy. AFA — regulates agricultural commodities including tea, coffee, and horticultural products.

Parliament of Kenya — bicameral: National Assembly (349 members) and Senate (67 members). Contact through parliament.go.ke. Kenya's 2010 Constitution includes strong środowiskowy protection provisions (Article 42 — right to a clean and healthy environment).

KH.s: Lower-middle-income gospodarka ($46.4B PKB) with garment manufacturing (27.8% PKB) and agriculture (16.6%). Mekong Delta wylesianie ongoing. Authoritarian governance under Hun Manet (succeeded Hun Sen in 2023).

Nie do złamania. Coal combustion releases pollutants.

ESM — state electricity company operating the Bitola lignite plant.
ERC (Energy Regulatory Commission) — regulator energii. Energy Community Treaty membership requires EU energy acquis alignment.
Sobranie (Assembly of North Macedonia) — unicameral, 120 members. kandydat do UE country.

ML.s: Sahelian gospodarka ($26.8B PKB) with gold górnictwo (16.18% PKB) and agriculture (33.3% PKB). Military junta since 2020-2021 coups. Security crisis (jihadist insurgency). Third-largest gold producer in Africa.

sectors.w: Mali's gold górnictwo generates mercury contamination (artisanal) and cyanide risks (industrial). Gdy środowiskowy data is published alongside production, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: International supply chain due diligence requiring mine-level środowiskowy compliance. Gdy buyers verify conditions, nakładający się interes w unregulated extraction słabnie.
Per-mine środowiskowy monitoring published through EITI. Mali's EITI membership provides the framework.
Częściowo łamalne. Mining disturbs landscapes. Mercury-free processing can reduce artisanal górnictwo zależność systemowa.
a: Report through international górnictwo company channels (Barrick Gold, B2Gold)
Zgłosić do DNGM (Direction Nationale de la Géologie et des Mines)
Udokumentować przez international monitoring organizations

Support international górnictwo company home-country oversight
i: DNGM — national geological and górnictwo directorate. Note: Mali is under military rule (CNSP). Civil society space is restricted.
Barrick Gold — operates Loulo-Gounkoto complex. B2Gold — operates Fekola mine. Resolute Mining — operates Syama mine. EITI Mali — member since 2006.
Ministry of Mines, Energy and Water — oversees górnictwo policy. Mali's 2019 Mining Code establishes środowiskowy obligations.
Note: Military transition government. National Transitional Council replaces elected legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Mali suspended), African Union, EITI Board.

MM.s: Resource-rich gospodarka ($74.1B PKB) under military junta since 2021 coup. Renty gazowe 4.4%. Jade and gem górnictwo (est. $31B/year — more than formal PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 20.8% PKB. Civil war affecting multiple regions.

sectors.w: Myanmar's jade industry is largely opaque — estimated at $31B/year but mostly unrecorded. Gdy jade revenue flows are made visible (Global Witness has documented significant flows to military), W staje się obliczalne.
bp: International sankcje targeting jade and gem revenues flowing to the military junta. Gdy revenue is blocked, the nakładający się interes between the military and jade górnictwo słabnie.
Supply chain przejrzystość for jade and gems using blockchain traceability. Global Witness and others have documented the flows — formalizing this breaks system independence.
Częściowo łamalne. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes. Myanmar's jade mines in Kachin State have caused catastrophic landslides.

i: Note: Myanmar under the military junta (State Administration Council) has no functioning społeczeństwo obywatelskie space. Global Witness has published extensive reports on Myanmar's jade industry. Justice for Myanmar — international advocacy organization documenting military business interests.
Myanmar Gems Enterprise — military-controlled entity managing gem auctions. International buyers increasingly apply conflict mineral frameworks to Myanmar sourcing.
International engagement only — domestic regulation under junta is not independent.

Note: Myanmar's elected parliament (Pyidaungsu Hluttaw) was dissolved by the military coup. The National Unity Government (NUG) — the democratic opposition government in exile — has proposed alternative governance frameworks. International channels: ASEAN (Special Envoy process), UN Human Rights Council, targeted sankcje by US, EU, UK.

MN.s: Resource-dependent landlocked gospodarka ($23.8B PKB). Mining at 26.57% PKB (copper, coal, gold). Coal at 4.89% PKB. Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto/Turquoise Hill). Parliamentary demokracja — rare in the region.

sectors.w: Mongolia's górnictwo sector (particularly coal and copper) generates dust pollution and depletes water in the Gobi. Gdy na kopalnię środowiskowy data is linked to production revenue, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees reflecting true scarcity. Gdy górnictwo companies pay for water in arid steppe, nakładający się interes w water-intensive extraction słabnie.
Per-mine środowiskowy monitoring data published through EITI Mongolia. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Mining in arid environments inherently affects limited water resources. However, dry processing and water recycling can reduce dependence.
