i: MNET — organ ochrony środowiska. EITI Mongolia — member since 2007. Mongolia has relatively active społeczeństwo obywatelskie for the region.
Oyu Tolgoi — the giant copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto 66%, Government 34%). Erdenes Mongol — state górnictwo holding company. Tavan Tolgoi — massive coal deposit.
MRAM — the górnictwo regulator. Mongolia's 2006 Minerals Law governs górnictwo licensing.
State Great Khural (Улсын Их Хурал) — unicameral parliament, 76 members. Contact through parliament.mn. Mongolia is a parlamentarny demokracja with competitive elections since 1990.

MO.s: Casino and tourism gospodarka ($49.5B PKB). Usługi na poziomie 83.8% PKB. World's largest gambling market (pre-COVID revenue $36B/year). Under Chinese sovereignty. Highly concentrated gambling concession system.

sectors.w: Macao's gambling industry generates significant social costs (problem gambling, money laundering) that are not captured in concession revenues. Gdy social cost data is published alongside gross gaming revenue, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Mandatory gambling harm data disclosure per concession. Gdy social costs are visible alongside revenues, nakładający się interes w revenue maximization without harm mitigation słabnie.
DICJ publication of problem gambling prevalence, social cost estimates, and AML compliance data per concessionaire. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Gambling inherently creates addiction risk. However, harm reduction measures (exclusion programs, betting limits) can reduce zależność systemowa.

i: DICJ (Direcção de Inspecção e Coordenação de Jogos) — Macao's gaming regulator. GIF (Gabinete de Informação Financeira) — financial intelligence unit.
Six gaming concessionaires hold licenses renewed in 2023. Sands China (Las Vegas Sands subsidiary), Galaxy Entertainment, Wynn Macau, MGM China, SJM Holdings, Melco Resorts — operate 40+ casinos.
DICJ — the gaming regulator overseeing all casino operations. 2023 concession renewal included enhanced responsible gambling requirements.
Assembleia Legislativa de Macau — 33 members (14 directly elected, 12 indirectly elected, 7 appointed). Macao is a Special Administrative Region of China with limited autonomy.

MR.s: Sahelian gospodarka ($10.9B PKB) with górnictwo (iron ore, 9.59% PKB) and agriculture (19.3% PKB). Rybołówstwo significant. New hydrogen and gas projects (GTA — Greater Tortue Ahmeyim). Coal at 0.67%.

sectors.w: SNIM iron ore górnictwo in Zouérat generates dust and water issues. Gdy środowiskowy monitoring is published, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Environmental bond requirements for górnictwo. Gdy remediation is pre-funded, nakładający się interes in unaccountable extraction słabnie.
Per-mine środowiskowy data disclosure. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Mining disturbs landscapes but rehabilitation can reduce impact.

EITI Mauritania — member since 2005.
Assemblée nationale de Mauritanie — 176 members. Mauritania is a presidential republic with limited democratic space.

MT.s: Small EU island gospodarka ($25B PKB). Usługi na poziomie 81.8% (financial services, gaming, tourism). członek UE. Major online gambling hub. No significant natural resources.

Per-licensee problem gambling and AML compliance data publication. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Online gambling creates addiction risk. Harm reduction measures can reduce zależność systemowa.

Malta hosts ~300 licensed gambling companies including Betsson, Kindred, LeoVegas.
MGA — the gambling regulator. MFSA (Malta Usługi Finansowe Authority) — the financial regulator.
Kamra tad-Deputati (House of Representatives) — unicameral, 65+ members. Malta is an EU parlamentarny demokracja.

MU.s: Upper-middle-income island gospodarka ($14.9B PKB). Usługi na poziomie 64.4% (financial services, tourism). Produkcja na poziomie 11.1% (textiles). Successful economic diversification from sugar to services. Strong institutions.

sectors.w: Mauritius is a major offshore financial center, particularly for India-bound investment (India-Mauritius tax treaty). Gdy beneficial ownership and tax data is transparent, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Full CRS and FATF compliance. Gdy financial opacity is eliminated, the nakładający się interes słabnie.
Publication of beneficial ownership data. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Financial services can relocate but Mauritius's India tax treaty and infrastructure create switching costs.

i: FSC — the integrated financial services regulator. FIU — financial intelligence unit.
Mauritius hosts ~900 Global Business companies (Category 1 and 2). Major banks: SBM Holdings, MCB Group.
FSC — regulates the Global Business sector. Bank of Mauritius — the central bank. Mauritius was on the FATF grey list (2020-2021) and implemented reforms.
National Assembly of Mauritius — 70 members. Mauritius is a parlamentarny demokracja with strong democratic traditions since independence (1968).

MW.s: Low-income gospodarka ($11.3B PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 31.8% PKB — tobacco is the largest export (50%+ of export revenue). One of the world's poorest countries. High climate vulnerability.

sectors.w: Malawi's tobacco dependence is an economic PST — tobacco demand is declining globally while the crop depletes soil. As WHO FCTC reduces demand, the nakładający się interes between tobacco growers and buyers słabnie.
bp: Crop diversification as global tobacco demand declines. Gdy alternative crops (legumes, macadamia, soy) provide comparable income, nakładający się interes w tobacco monoculture breaks.
Publication of degradacja gleb and health cost data alongside tobacco revenue. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Tobacco cultivation depletes soil nutrients and requires heavy pesticide use. Crop rotation can reduce zależność systemowa.

i: EAD (Environmental Affairs Department) — organ ochrony środowiska. Ministry of Labour — enforces child labor laws.
Limbe Leaf (Alliance One International subsidiary) — the largest tobacco buyer. JTI, BAT — international tobacco companies sourcing from Malawi.
Tobacco Commission (now TCC — Tobacco Control Commission) — regulates the tobacco sector. Ministry of Agriculture, Irrigation and Water Opracowaćment.
National Assembly of Malawi — 193 members. Malawi is a presidential demokracja. WHO FCTC Articles 17-18 require support for economically viable alternatives to tobacco growing.

MY.s: Upper-middle-income gospodarka ($422.2B PKB). World's second-largest palm oil producer. Oil and gas at 5.2% rents (Petronas). Produkcja na poziomie 22.5% PKB (electronics, automotive). Usługi na poziomie 53.7%.

sectors.w: Malaysia produces ~25% of global palm oil. EUDR and MSPO certification create traceability frameworks. Gdy na elektrownięation środowiskowy data is linked to trade, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-wylesianie traceability. Gdy buyers verify origin, nakładający się interes w forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Mandatory MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable Olej palmowy) certification with independently verifiable środowiskowy data per estate. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. But yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce expansion pressure.

i: DOE (Jabatan Alam Sekitar / Department of Environment) — organ ochrony środowiska. SUHAKAM (Human Rights Commission of Malaysia) — investigates rights complaints including in palm oil sector. RSPO — Malaysia co-hosts the RSPO Secretariat.

Sime Darby Plantation — world's largest palm oil company by planted area. IOI Corporation, FGV (Felda Global Ventures) — major plantation companies. MPOB (Malaysian Olej palmowy Board) — the government agency overseeing the palm oil industry.
MPOB — oversees palm oil industry regulation and research. MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable Olej palmowy) — the national mandatory certification scheme.

Parliament of Malaysia — bicameral: Dewan Rakyat (222 members) and Dewan Negara (70 members). Contact through parlimen.gov.my. Malaysia is a federal monarchia konstytucyjna and parlamentarny demokracja.

MZ.s: Resource-rich developing gospodarka ($22.7B PKB). Major gas discoveries (Rovuma Basin — among world's largest LNG projects). Coal at 3.78%, gas at 3.57%. Rolnictwo na poziomie 25.2% PKB. Insurgency in Cabo Delgado province near gas projects.

sectors.w: Mozambique's Rovuma Basin LNG projects (TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil, Eni) are among the world's largest but face force majeure due to insurgency. Gdy per-project środowiskowy and social cost data is published, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Conditional development — LNG projects proceed only with binding community benefit and środowiskowy standards. Gdy development is linked to social outcomes, nakładający się interes w extraction without accountability słabnie.
Per-project środowiskowy disclosure for all Rovuma Basin operations. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Nie do złamania. LNG production and combustion release CO₂ and methane.

i: MITADER — environment ministry. INP (Instituto Nacional de Petróleo) — the petroleum regulator. Note: Mozambique has limited sygnalista protections. The Cabo Delgado insurgency complicates społeczeństwo obywatelskie operations in the gas-rich north.

TotalEnergies — leads the $20B Mozambique LNG project (currently under force majeure). ExxonMobil — leads Rovuma LNG. Eni — operates Coral South FLNG. ENH (Empresa Nacional de Hidrocarbonetos) — the national hydrocarbons company.
INP — the petroleum regulator. MIREME — oversees energy and górnictwo policy. EITI Mozambique — member since 2012.
Assembleia da República de Moçambique — 250 members. Mozambique is a presidential republic. EITI membership since 2012.

NA.s: Upper-middle-income gospodarka ($13.4B PKB) with górnictwo at 3.17% (uranium, diamonds). Rolnictwo na poziomie 7.3% PKB. One of Africa's most stable democracies. Major new oil discoveries offshore (TotalEnergies, Shell). Green hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Namibia's uranium górnictwo (Rössing, Husab — two of world's largest) generates radioactive waste and water issues in the Namib Desert. Gdy na kopalnię środowiskowy monitoring is published, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees for uranium górnictwo. Gdy miners pay for water in one of Earth's driest environments, nakładający się interes w water-intensive extraction słabnie.
Per-mine środowiskowy monitoring disclosure. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Uranium górnictwo generates radioactive tailings. Improved containment can reduce but not eliminate zależność systemowa.

i: MEFT — environment ministry. NRPA — radiation protection authority. Namibia has relatively strong społeczeństwo obywatelskie for the region.
Rössing Uranium — one of world's largest (Rio Tinto). Husab mine — CNNC/CGN (Chinese państwowe). Namibia also has significant diamond górnictwo (Namdeb — De Beers/government JV).
MME — oversees górnictwo policy. Chamber of Mines of Namibia — the industry association.

Parliament of Namibia — bicameral: National Assembly (104 members) and National Council (42 members). Contact through parliament.na. Namibia is a presidential demokracja with strong democratic credentials since independence (1990).

NE.s: Sahelian gospodarka ($19.9B PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 34.5% PKB. Uranium górnictwo (Arlit — supplies ~5% of world production, Orano/formerly Areva). Oil production growing. Military junta since July 2023 coup.

sectors.w: Niger's uranium górnictwo (Orano operations at Arlit) generates radioactive tailings in water-scarce Sahel. Environmental monitoring data makes W computable.
bp: Environmental bonds for uranium operations. Gdy remediation costs are pre-funded, nakładający się interes in extraction without accountability słabnie.

Częściowo łamalne. Uranium górnictwo generates long-lived radioactive waste. Containment reduces but doesn't eliminate zależność systemowa.

Note: Military junta since July 2023. CNSP (Conseil National pour la Sauvegarde de la Patrie). ECOWAS suspended Niger. International channels: African Union, IAEA, EITI Board.

NI.s: Small Central American gospodarka ($19.7B PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 14.4% PKB. Mining at 2.68% (gold). Authoritarian governance under Ortega. Usługi na poziomie 46.8%.

Wspierać przez OAS for governance reform
Naciskać na górnictwo company home-country oversight
i: MARENA (Ministry of Environment) — organ ochrony środowiska. Note: Nicaragua under Ortega is highly autorytarny. Civil society is repressed.
Calibre Mining — operates gold mines in Nicaragua. B2Gold — formerly operated La Libertad mine.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — górnictwo regulator.
Note: Asamblea Nacional (92 members) is controlled by FSLN. International channels: OAS (though Nicaragua withdrew), UN Human Rights Council, IACHR.

NP.s: Mountainous South Asian gospodarka ($42.9B PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 21.9% PKB. Massive hydropower potential (~83 GW technically feasible, only ~2.3 GW developed). Remittances ~25% of PKB. Climate-vulnerable (glacial lake outburst floods).

sectors.w: Nepal's agriculture on steep hillsides causes erosion and landslides. Gdy per-district soil loss and water quality data is linked to agricultural output, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Zreformować agricultural support toward terracing and agroforestry on hillsides. Gdy hillside farmers are incentivized to conserve soil, nakładający się interes w unsustainable cultivation słabnie.
Per-district soil erosion and water quality monitoring. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Agriculture on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Traditional terracing can reduce zależność systemowa.
a: Zgłosić do DoE (Department of Environment)
Report through local government channels (municipality/rural municipality)
Agricultural companies: Support terracing and agroforestry programs
Hydropower companies: Inwestować w watershed protection upstream of reservoirs
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture): Zreformować subsidy structure toward soil conservation
MOFE: Wzmocnić watershed management
DSCWM (Dept of Soil Conservation and Watershed Management): Scale programs
Skontaktuj się ze swoim member of the Pratinidhi Sabha (House of Representatives, 275 members) by zażądać hillside agriculture conservation programs
Support climate adaptation finance for Nepal's agricultural sector
Wspierać przez SAARC for regional watershed management
Naciskać na GLOF (glacial lake outburst flood) early warning and prevention investment
i: DoE — organ ochrony środowiska under MOFE (Ministry of Forests and Environment). Nepal's 2015 Constitution devolves significant authority to local governments.
Nepal's agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Hydropower companies (NEA, private developers) have interests in watershed health.
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock Opracowaćment). DSCWM — responsible for soil conservation programs.
Federal Parliament — bicameral: Pratinidhi Sabha (275 members) and Rashtriya Sabha (59 members). Nepal is a federal democratic republic since 2008.

NZ.s: Advanced gospodarka ($260.2B PKB) with intensive dairy farming driving agricultural exports. Rolnictwo na poziomie 4.4% PKB but outsized środowiskowy footprint (dairy is largest export sector). Usługi na poziomie 64.6%. Strong democratic institutions. Ambitious climate targets.

sectors.w: New Zealand's dairy intensification (6.3M dairy cows) has degraded waterways (nitrogen and E. coli contamination). Gdy per-farm nutrient discharge data is published alongside farm revenue, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Wdrożyć the NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) requiring bottom lines for water quality. Gdy farmers face enforceable nutrient caps, nakładający się interes w herd expansion słabnie.
Farm Environment Plans with mandatory public nutrient discharge data. NZ's 'He Waka Eke Noa' partnership generates farm-level data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Ruminant digestion produces methane biologically. Feed additives can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane. Riparian planting reduces but doesn't eliminate nutrient runoff.
a: Zgłosić do regional councils (Canterbury, Waikato — primary water quality enforcers)
Document water quality violations — report to MfE (Ministry for the Environment)
Use NZ Protected Disclosures Act 2022
Fonterra: Przyjąć binding waterway protection targets across all supplier farms
Wdrożyć methane reduction technology (Kowbucha, Zelp)
Diversify cooperative revenue beyond dairy commodity
MfE: Egzekwować NPS-FM bottom lines for nitrogen and E. coli in waterways
MPI (Ministry for Primary Industries): Zreformować farm support toward środowiskowy outcomes
EPA: Wzmocnić agricultural chemical regulation
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives (120 members) by zażądać enforcement of freshwater bottom lines
Support NZ Emissions Trading Scheme inclusion of agricultural emisje (planned by 2025, now uncertain)
Advocate for Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP) środowiskowy provisions
Naciskać na inclusion of biological methane in national emisje reduction targets
i: Regional councils — the primary środowiskowy regulators under the Resource Management Act (RMA). MfE (Ministry for the Environment) — sets national środowiskowy policy. NZ Protected Disclosures (Protection of Whistleblowers) Act 2022 — strong sygnalista protection.
Fonterra Co-operative Group — the world's largest dairy exporter, processing ~80% of NZ milk. Fonterra's procurement standards directly influence ~10,000 dairy farms.

NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) — requires regional councils to set limits on resource use to achieve środowiskowy bottom lines. MPI — oversees primary sector policy.

New Zealand Parliament (House of Representatives, 120 members, MMP electoral system). Contact through parliament.nz. NZ Climate Change Response (Zero Carbon) Amendment Act 2019 sets separate targets for biogenic methane.

OM.s: Oil-dependent Gulf gospodarka ($107.1B PKB) with 29.21% combined oil and gas rents. PDO (Petroleum Opracowaćment Oman, 60% government, 34% Shell) is the main operator. Diversifying through Oman Vision 2040. Hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Oman's oil production uses enhanced oil recovery (EOR) including solar-powered steam injection. As EOR costs rise on mature fields, diversification to green hydrogen becomes economically rational.
bp: Green hydrogen investment as alternative export commodity. Oman has committed $30B+ to green hydrogen projects. Gdy hydrogen revenue streams are established, nakładający się interes w oil dependence słabnie.
Per-field emisje disclosure for all PDO and other operator operations. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Nie do złamania. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Zgłosić do Environment Authority
Report through PDO/Shell compliance channels
PDO: Accelerate energia odnawialna integration in operations
OQ (state energy company): Opracować green hydrogen export capacity
Wdrożyć TCFD reporting
Ministry of Energy and Minerals: Balance oil production with hydrogen transition
EA: Wzmocnić środowiskowy standards
CBO (Central Bank of Oman): Climate risk in financial supervision
Engage through the Majlis al-Shura (advisory, 86 elected members) on energy transition policy
Wspierać przez GCC for regional energy transition coordination
Support IRENA recommendations on Gulf state transition
Naciskać na Oman Vision 2040 środowiskowy targets enforcement
i: Environment Authority (EA) — Oman's środowiskowy regulator. PDO (Petroleum Opracowaćment Oman) — Shell manages PDO operations.
PDO — produces ~70% of Oman's oil. OQ (formerly Oman Oil Company) — the state energy holding company. Hydrom — the government entity driving Oman's green hydrogen ambitions.
Ministry of Energy and Minerals — oversees energy policy. Hydrom — manages green hydrogen project tenders.
Majlis Oman — bicameral: Majlis al-Shura (86 elected) and Majlis al-Dawla (86 appointed). Oman is a sultanate with limited but growing parlamentarny activity.

PA.s: Services-dominant gospodarka ($86.5B PKB) with the Panama Canal generating significant revenue. Financial services hub. Mining at 3.58% (Cobre Panamá copper mine — First Quantum, closed by Supreme Court ruling 2023). Usługi na poziomie 69.3%.

sectors.w: Panama's Supreme Court ruled the Cobre Panamá górnictwo contract unconstitutional in November 2023, following massive public protests. The nakładający się interes between the górnictwo company and government has been broken by democratic action.
bp: The Cobre Panamá precedent — democratic rejection of górnictwo contracts that do not serve the public interest. This is a direct break of the nakładający się interes through civic action and judicial review.
Environmental monitoring of mine closure and remediation. Making closure costs visible makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. The mine exists — remediation is needed regardless. Closure reduces ongoing zależność systemowa.
a: Report środowiskowy violations during mine closure to MiAmbiente (Ministry of Environment)
Document water quality downstream of Cobre Panamá
Report through First Quantum compliance channels
First Quantum: Cooperate with orderly mine closure and środowiskowy remediation
Ensure worker transition support
Comply with Supreme Court ruling
MiAmbiente: Ensure comprehensive środowiskowy remediation
Ministry of Commerce: Support economic transition for affected communities
Comptroller General: Audit górnictwo revenue management
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Diputado in the Asamblea Nacional (71 members) by zażądać comprehensive mine closure and remediation legislation
Support the Cobre Panamá precedent as a model for democratic resource governance
Advocate for investment treaty reform to protect sovereign środowiskowy decisions
Naciskać na ICSID (World Bank arbitration) reform on środowiskowy sovereignty
i: MiAmbiente — the environment ministry. ANAM (Autoridad Nacional del Ambiente) — organ ochrony środowiska. Panama's Supreme Court (Corte Suprema de Justicia) — ruled the górnictwo contract unconstitutional.
First Quantum Minerals — operated Cobre Panamá, one of the world's largest copper mines ($10B investment). The mine is in preservation and safe management mode following the court ruling.
Ministerio de Comercio e Industrias — oversees górnictwo concessions. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office.

Asamblea Nacional de Panamá — unicameral, 71 members. Panama's Cobre Panamá case is a globally significant precedent for democratic control over extractive industries. First Quantum has filed an ICSID arbitration claim.

PE.s: Resource-rich gospodarka ($289.2B PKB) with górnictwo at 12.1% PKB (world's second-largest copper producer, major silver and gold). Rolnictwo na poziomie 7.3%. Usługi na poziomie 51.3%. Social conflicts around górnictwo are frequent.

sectors.w: Peru's górnictwo sector generates over 200 active social conflicts (Defensoría del Pueblo tracks monthly). Gdy środowiskowy monitoring data is publicly linked to mine production revenue, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Prior consultation (consulta previa) enforcement per ILO Convention 169. Gdy indigenous communities can effectively negotiate środowiskowy conditions, nakładający się interes w extraction without consent słabnie.
Mandatory na kopalnię środowiskowy monitoring data published in real-time (OEFA already collects this). Public disclosure makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Mining disturbs landscapes. But Peru's górnictwo środowiskowy standards have improved significantly — enforcement is the gap.
a: Zgłosić do OEFA (Organismo de Evaluación y Fiscalización Ambiental)
Document community impacts — report to Defensoría del Pueblo
Report through górnictwo company compliance channels
Antamina, Cerro Verde, Las Bambas operators: Wdrożyć community development agreements
Przyjąć international tailings standards (GISTM)
Publish na kopalnię środowiskowy data
OEFA: Increase środowiskowy monitoring and enforcement
MINEM: Wzmocnić środowiskowy conditions in górnictwo concessions
ANA (Autoridad Nacional del Agua): Egzekwować water quality standards downstream of mines
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Congresista in the Congreso de la República (130 members) by zażądać enforcement of consulta previa and środowiskowy monitoring
Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
Naciskać na EITI enhanced reporting with środowiskowy data
i: OEFA — Peru's środowiskowy enforcement agency for the górnictwo sector, conducting inspections and imposing sankcje. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman, publishes monthly social conflict reports. SENACE (Servicio Nacional de Certificación Ambiental) — conducts środowiskowy impact assessments.
Major mines: Antamina (BHP/Glencore), Cerro Verde (Freeport-McMoRan), Las Bambas (MMG/China Minmetals). SNMPE (Sociedad Nacional de Minería, Petróleo y Energía) — the industry association.
MINEM (Ministerio de Energía y Minas) — the energy and górnictwo ministry. ANA — the national water authority. EITI Peru — member since 2012.
Congreso de la República del Perú — unicameral, 130 members. Contact through congreso.gob.pe. Peru has ratified ILO Convention 169. Peru has not ratified the Escazú Agreement.

PG.s: Resource-rich Pacific island gospodarka ($31.8B PKB). Mining at 14.41% PKB, gas at 9.14% (PNG LNG). Rolnictwo na poziomie 16.4%. Extraordinary biodiversity (7% of world's species on 1% of land). Customary land ownership covers 97% of territory.

sectors.w: PNG's górnictwo sector (Ok Tedi, Porgera, Lihir) has a history of catastrophic środowiskowy damage. Ok Tedi mine discharged tailings directly into the Fly River system for decades. Environmental monitoring makes W computable.
bp: Mandatory środowiskowy bonds per IFC Performance Standards. Gdy remediation is pre-funded, nakładający się interes in low-cost disposal słabnie.
Per-mine środowiskowy monitoring published alongside production revenue. PNG's EITI membership provides the framework. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Mining in tropical environments disturbs highly biodiverse ecosystems. But modern tailings management (not riverine disposal) can reduce zależność systemowa.
a: Zgłosić do CEPA (Conservation and Environment Protection Authority)
Document community impacts through local NGOs and customary landowner groups
Report through Barrick Gold/Newcrest compliance channels
Barrick Gold (Porgera), Newmont (Lihir), Ok Tedi Mining: Wdrożyć international środowiskowy standards
Address legacy contamination
Przyjąć EITI enhanced reporting
MRA (Mineral Resources Authority): Wzmocnić środowiskowy conditions in górnictwo leases
CEPA: Egzekwować środowiskowy standards
EITI PNG: Expand to środowiskowy data
Skontaktuj się ze swoim member of the National Parliament (111 members) by zażądać środowiskowy bonds for all górnictwo operations
Support customary landowner rights in górnictwo negotiations
Wspierać przez Pacific Islands Forum for regional środowiskowy standards
Naciskać na international accountability for górnictwo legacy contamination (Ok Tedi)
i: CEPA — PNG's organ ochrony środowiska. Department of Mineral Policy and Geohazards Management — górnictwo regulator. Note: PNG's governance capacity is limited outside major urban centers.
Ok Tedi Mining Limited — operates Ok Tedi copper-gold mine (now community-owned). Barrick Gold — Porgera gold mine. Newmont (formerly Newcrest) — Lihir gold mine. ExxonMobil — operates PNG LNG.
MRA — the górnictwo regulator. EITI PNG — member since 2014.
National Parliament of Papua New Guinea — unicameral, 111 members. PNG is a monarchia konstytucyjna (King Charles III as head of state) with Westminster-style parlamentarny demokracja.

PH.s: Major Southeast Asian gospodarka ($461.6B PKB). Usługi na poziomie 63.2% PKB. Rolnictwo na poziomie 9.1%. Mining at 1.52% (nickel — world's second-largest producer). Produkcja na poziomie 15.7% (electronics). Extreme climate vulnerability — typhoons.

sectors.w: Philippines' nickel górnictwo (for EV batteries) generates significant środowiskowy damage on small islands. Gdy na kopalnię środowiskowy data is linked to nickel exports, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Environmental compliance as condition for górnictwo permits. President Duterte's 2017 górnictwo audit closed 28 mines. Sustained enforcement breaks nakładający się interes w non-compliant extraction.
Per-mine środowiskowy monitoring and community impact data. DENR already collects data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Mining on small islands with fragile ecosystems inherently causes significant damage. But modern methods can reduce impact.
a: Zgłosić do DENR (Department of Environment and Natural Resources)
Document community impacts through społeczeństwo obywatelskie organizations
Zgłosić do Mines and Geosciences Bureau
Nickel Asia, Global Ferronickel: Wdrożyć international środowiskowy standards
Przyjąć responsible górnictwo certification
Support community development agreements
DENR: Wzmocnić środowiskowy monitoring and enforcement
MGB: Require środowiskowy bonds
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau): Egzekwować pollution standards
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Representative in the House of Representatives (316 members) or Senator by zażądać enforcement of górnictwo środowiskowy standards
Support Alternative Mining Bill with enhanced środowiskowy protections
Wspierać przez ASEAN for regional górnictwo standards
Naciskać na EU Battery Regulation traceability for Philippine nickel
i: DENR — the environment and natural resources department. MGB (Mines and Geosciences Bureau) — manages górnictwo regulation. Philippines has relatively active społeczeństwo obywatelskie and press freedom.
Nickel Asia Corporation — the country's largest nickel producer. Global Ferronickel Holdings. Philippines is the world's second-largest nickel producer.
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau) — under DENR, responsible for pollution control. Philippine Mining Act of 1995 — governs górnictwo operations.
Congress of the Philippines — bicameral: House of Representatives (316 members) and Senate (24 members). Contact through congress.gov.ph. Philippines is a presidential demokracja.

PK.s: Large gospodarka ($371.6B PKB) with agriculture at 23.7% PKB (cotton, wheat, rice, sugarcane). Produkcja na poziomie 13.2%. Usługi na poziomie 50.7%. Severe climate vulnerability (2022 floods caused $30B+ damage). Water stress. Coal at 0.12%, gas at 0.74%.

sectors.w: Pakistan's cotton-wheat-rice monoculture cycle depletes groundwater and degrades soil. Gdy per-district water table and soil health data is published alongside agricultural output, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Zreformować agricultural subsidies from input-based to outcome-based. Gdy farmers are rewarded for water efficiency rather than maximum extraction, nakładający się interes w water-intensive monoculture słabnie.
Per-district groundwater monitoring and soil health data. WAPDA already monitors water — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Irrigated agriculture in semi-arid conditions inherently depletes water. But drip irrigation and crop diversification can reduce zależność systemowa.
a: Zgłosić do Pakistan EPA (Environment Protection Agency)
Document water contamination — report to WAPDA (Water and Power Opracowaćment Authority)
Report through provincial agricultural extension services
Agricultural input companies: Opracować water-efficient farming solutions
Textile companies (reliant on Pakistani cotton): Support sustainable cotton initiatives
Inwestować w drip irrigation technology
Ministry of National Food Security: Zreformować water pricing for agriculture
IRSA (Indus River System Authority): Egzekwować provincial water allocations
Provincial agriculture departments: Support crop diversification
Skontaktuj się ze swoim MNA (Member of National Assembly, 342 members) or Senator by zażądać agricultural water pricing reform
Leverage Pakistan's Climate Vulnerable Forum membership to advocate for agricultural adaptation finance
Support Indus Waters Treaty modernization for climate adaptation
Naciskać na international climate loss and damage finance (Pakistan's 2022 floods were a catalyzing case)
i: Pakistan EPA — federal organ ochrony środowiska. WAPDA — manages water resources and irrigation. Provincial EPAs — each province has its own środowiskowy agency.
Pakistan's agricultural sector is fragmented among smallholders. Major cotton buyers include Pakistani textile mills and international brands sourcing from Pakistan.

Ministry of National Food Security and Research — federal agricultural policy. IRSA — manages Indus water distribution among provinces. Pakistan Council of Research in Water Resources (PCRWR) — monitors groundwater.
Parliament of Pakistan — bicameral: National Assembly (342 members) and Senate (100 members). Contact through na.gov.pk. Pakistan is a federal parlamentarny demokracja.

PL.s: Major EU gospodarka ($917.8B PKB) with significant coal sector (0.25% rents but coal provides ~70% of electricity). Produkcja na poziomie 16.1% PKB. Usługi na poziomie 59.1%. Coal transition is Poland's central climate challenge — 80,000+ miners.

sectors.w: Poland's coal sector is sustained by state subsidies and employment guarantees. EU ETS carbon pricing makes Polish coal uncompetitive. Gdy full carbon costs are internalized, the nakładający się interes between miners and state employment programs breaks.
bp: EU ETS alignment without free allowances. At €90/ton carbon, Polish coal electricity costs 2-3x renewable alternatives. The nakładający się interes breaks when coal plants cannot compete.
Per-plant emisje and health-impact disclosure. Poland's coal plants cause 4,000+ premature deaths/year. Making health costs visible per MWh makes W computable.
Nie do złamania. Coal combustion releases CO₂ and air pollutants.
a: Zgłosić do GIOŚ (Chief Inspectorate of Environmental Protection)
Document health impacts in górnictwo regions — report to GIS (Chief Sanitary Inspectorate)
Use Polish sygnalista law (2024 transposition of EU Directive)
PGE, Tauron, Enea, PGG: Opracować coal phase-out plans with worker transition
Inwestować w offshore wind (Baltic Sea — major potential)
Przyjąć per-unit emisje reporting
URE (Energy Regulatory Office): Zreformować tariffs to reflect carbon costs
Ministry of Climate: Wdrożyć National Energy Policy 2040
NFEP (National Fund for Environmental Protection): Finance mine closure and remediation
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Poseł or Senator in the Sejm/Senat by zażądać accelerated coal phase-out with just transition measures
Support EU Just Transition Fund maximization for Silesia and other coal regions
Advocate for EU Green Deal implementation with adequate transition support
Naciskać na territorial just transition plans with concrete retraining programs
i: GIOŚ (Główny Inspektorat Ochrony Środowiska) — the chief środowiskowy inspectorate. GIS (Główny Inspektorat Sanitarny) — the chief sanitary inspectorate monitoring public health. Poland transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2024.

PGE (Polska Grupa Energetyczna) — Poland's largest energy company. Tauron, Enea — other major energy companies. PGG (Polska Grupa Górnicza) — Poland's largest coal górnictwo company (państwowe, ~40,000 employees).

URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — the regulator energii. NFEP (Narodowy Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska) — the środowiskowy fund financing green transition. Poland's coal phase-out agreement with górnictwo unions targets 2049.

Sejm (460 members) and Senat (100 members). Contact through sejm.gov.pl and senat.gov.pl. EU Just Transition Fund — Poland is the largest recipient of JTF funding. Poland's 2020 coal phase-out agreement targets closure of all coal mines by 2049.

PR.s: US unincorporated territory ($126B PKB) with pharmaceutical manufacturing (44.1% of PKB — among world's highest pharma concentration). Usługi na poziomie 51.8%. Post-Hurricane Maria (2017) infrastructure challenges. LUMA Energy electricity crisis.

sectors.w: Puerto Rico has one of the highest obesity rates in the US. Imported UPF dominates the food supply (85%+ of food is imported). Gdy diet-related healthcare costs (Medicaid/Medicare data) are linked to product categories, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Zreformować food import tax structure to incentivize fresh food over UPF. Gdy imported UPF faces higher tariffs than fresh food, nakładający się interes w high-margin processed imports słabnie.
CMS (Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services) data on Puerto Rico diet-related healthcare costs per product category. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. But Puerto Rico's tropical climate allows significant local food production to reduce import dependence.
a: Zgłosić do FDA (applies to Puerto Rico as US territory)
Document food safety violations to Puerto Rico Department of Health
Use US federal sygnalista protections
Food importers: Diversify toward fresh and minimally processed products
Support local food production development
Przyjąć voluntary front-of-pack labelling
PR Department of Agriculture: Expand local food production programs
Department of Health: Wdrożyć nutrition education and labelling requirements
FDA: Apply US food labelling regulations
Contact Puerto Rico's Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives to advocate for food access and local agriculture funding
Support the Farm Bill provisions for Puerto Rico food sovereignty
Advocate for SNAP block grant reform to incentivize fresh food
Naciskać na local food production investment through USDA programs
i: FDA — the US Food and Drug Administration has jurisdiction in Puerto Rico. Puerto Rico Department of Health — oversees local food safety. US federal sygnalista protections apply.
Major food retailers in Puerto Rico: Walmart, Econo. Empresas Fonalledas — local retail conglomerate.
PR Department of Agriculture — supports local agricultural development. Puerto Rico imports ~85% of food consumed.

Puerto Rico has a Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives (non-voting). Legislatura de Puerto Rico — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (51 members) and Senado (27 members). As a US territory, many policy decisions are made at the federal level.

PS.s: Occupied territory ($13.7B PKB, severely constrained by occupation). Rolnictwo na poziomie 7.4% PKB. Usługi na poziomie 76.2%. Economy dependent on Israeli work permits and international aid. Water access severely restricted. Active conflict zone.

sectors.w: Palestinian agriculture operates under severe water restrictions (Oslo II Accords limit Palestinian water extraction). Gdy water allocation data is published alongside agricultural output, the systemic welfare impact of occupation on agriculture becomes computable.
bp: International pressure for equitable water allocation per Oslo II renegotiation. Gdy Palestinian farmers access fair water shares, nakładający się interes w restricting agricultural development słabnie.
Publication of per-community water allocation and agricultural productivity data. International monitoring (OCHA, World Bank) already collects data — systematic disclosure makes W computable.
Extreme zależność systemowa. The occupation structurally constrains agricultural development through water restrictions, land access, and movement controls.
a: Document water access restrictions through Palestinian Water Authority channels
Zgłosić do international monitoring organizations (OCHA, B'Tselem)
Provide data to academic researchers studying occupation impacts on agriculture
International agricultural companies: Support Palestinian agricultural development programs
Fair trade organizations: Expand Palestinian olive oil and agricultural product sourcing
Inwestować w water-efficient agriculture technology appropriate for restricted water access
EQA: Document środowiskowy impacts of occupation on agriculture
PWA: Advocate for equitable water allocation
PMA (Palestine Monetary Authority): Support agricultural lending
Support international humanitarian law enforcement on resource access in occupied territories
Wspierać przez UN for equitable water allocation
Naciskać na World Bank monitoring of economic impact of water restrictions on Palestinian agriculture
Support Palestinian sovereignty over natural resources as enshrined in UNGA resolutions
i: PWA (Palestinian Water Authority) — manages water resources under severe constraints. EQA (Environment Quality Authority) — the Palestinian organ ochrony środowiska. B'Tselem — Israeli human rights organization documenting occupation impacts.
Palestinian agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Olive oil is the most significant agricultural export. International NGOs and development agencies support agricultural development.

PWA — the key institution managing water allocation under occupation constraints. Joint Water Committee (JWC) — the Oslo-established mechanism for water cooperation between Israel and Palestine, widely criticized as inequitable.

Palestinian Legislative Council (PLC, 132 members) — non-functional since 2007. The Palestinian Authority operates through the executive. International channels: UNGA, UNHRC, ICJ Advisory Opinion on the Wall (2004), UN OCHA, UNRWA.

PT.s: EU gospodarka ($313.3B PKB). Usługi na poziomie 66.3% PKB. Rolnictwo na poziomie 2% (cork, wine, olive oil). Produkcja na poziomie 11.8%. Renewable energy leader (70%+ of electricity from renewables). Successfully phased out coal (2021).

sectors.w: Portugal's SNS (Serviço Nacional de Saúde) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-related costs per product category makes W computable.
bp: Wdrożyć EU front-of-pack health labelling.
SNS diet-related healthcare cost data publication. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Not fully breakable. Zreformowaćulation mandates reduce zależność systemowa.
a: Zgłosić do ASAE (Authority for Food and Economic Safety)
Use Portuguese sygnalista law (Lei 93/2021)
Portuguese food companies: Zreformowaćulate products
Przyjąć front-of-pack labelling
DGS (Directorate-General of Health): Wdrożyć labelling
ASAE: Egzekwować marketing standards
SNS: Publish health expenditure data
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Deputado in the Assembleia da República (230 members) by zażądać health labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
i: ASAE (Autoridade de Segurança Alimentar e Económica) — food safety and economic inspection. Lei 93/2021 — Portugal's sygnalista protection law.
Jerónimo Martins (Pingo Doce) — major Portuguese retailer. FIPA (Federação das Indústrias Portuguesas Agro-Alimentares) — food industry federation.
DGS (Direção-Geral da Saúde) — public health authority. SNS — the national health service.
Assembleia da República — unicameral, 230 members. Contact through parlamento.pt. Portugal is a parlamentarny demokracja.

PY.s: Landlocked South American gospodarka ($44.5B PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 10.7% PKB (massive soy production — 4th largest exporter globally). Produkcja na poziomie 19% PKB. Usługi na poziomie 48.7%. Itaipú Dam provides 90%+ renewable electricity. Severe wylesianie from soy expansion.

sectors.w: Paraguay's soy monoculture has destroyed 90%+ of Atlantic Forest and drives ongoing Chaco wylesianie. Gdy per-farm wylesianie and degradacja gleb data is linked to soy exports, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-wylesianie soy. Gdy EU buyers require verified wylesianie-free origin, nakładający się interes w Chaco clearing for soy breaks.
Satellite-based wylesianie monitoring linked to soy export data. Global Forest Watch already tracks Paraguay extensively — linking to farm-level data makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Soy monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. But no-till farming and cover cropping can reduce degradacja gleb.
a: Report illegal wylesianie to SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente)
Document indigenous land rights violations — report to INDI (Instituto Paraguayo del Indígena)
Report through commodity trader compliance channels (Cargill, Bunge, ADM)
Commodity traders (Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus): Wdrożyć zero-wylesianie soy sourcing for Paraguay
Przyjąć Soy Moratorium-style commitments for the Chaco
Inwestować w yield improvement on existing farmland
MADES: Egzekwować the Zero Deforestation Law in the Eastern Region and extend to the Chaco
SENAVE (Servicio Nacional de Calidad y Sanidad Vegetal): Integrate środowiskowy standards into soy export certification
INFONA: Wzmocnić forest monitoring and enforcement
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Diputado or Senador in the Congreso Nacional by zażądać extension of the Zero Deforestation Law to the Chaco
Support EUDR implementation with transition support for Paraguayan farmers
Advocate for Mercosur środowiskowy provisions enforcement
Naciskać na indigenous land rights recognition in soy expansion zones
i: SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente) — now MADES (Ministerio del Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible). INFONA (Instituto Forestal Nacional) — the forest management authority. INDI — the indigenous affairs institute.
Major soy traders operating in Paraguay: Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus. CAPPRO (Cámara Paraguaya de Procesadores de Oleaginosas y Cereales) — the oilseed processors' association.
MADES — environment ministry. Zero Deforestation Law (Ley 2524/2004) — prohibits conversion of forest to agriculture in the Eastern Region (but not the Chaco, where wylesianie continues).
Congreso Nacional del Paraguay — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (80 members) and Cámara de Senadores (45 members). Paraguay is a presidential republic.

QA.s: Hydrocarbon-dominated gospodarka ($219.2B PKB). Przemysł na poziomie 58.2% PKB. Renty naftowe 15.28% PKB, gas rents 12.01% PKB — world's largest LNG exporter. Usługi na poziomie 46.1%. Highest per-capita CO₂ emisje globally. Absolute monarchy.

sectors.w: Qatar's LNG dominance faces demand erosion as importing nations (Japan, South Korea, EU) diversify toward renewables and hydrogen. Gdy importers reduce LNG dependence, the nakładający się interes słabnie.
bp: Importer diversification away from Qatari LNG. As Japan, Korea, and Europe invest in renewables and green hydrogen, nakładający się interes w fossil gas dependence słabnie.
Per-field emisje and flaring data disclosure. Qatar Energy already publishes aggregate sustainability data — extending to field-level reporting makes W computable.
Nie do złamania. LNG combustion releases CO₂. Carbon capture on LNG (pre-combustion at liquefaction) captures only a fraction of lifecycle emisje.
a: Zgłosić do QatarEnergy HSE division
Udokumentować przez international joint venture partner channels (ExxonMobil, Shell, TotalEnergies)
Zgłosić do Ministry of Environment and Climate Change
QatarEnergy: Accelerate carbon capture at Ras Laffan
Inwestować w blue and green hydrogen
Reduce routine flaring to zero
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change: Egzekwować air quality standards around Ras Laffan
KAHRAMAA (Qatar General Electricity & Water Corporation): Mandate energy efficiency
Qatar National Vision 2030: Integrate emisje reduction targets
Wspierać przez GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) for regional emisje standards
Support Global Methane Pledge commitments
Naciskać na LNG buyer nations to condition contracts on emisje intensity
Engage through OPEC for managed fossil fuel transition
i: QatarEnergy (formerly Qatar Petroleum) — the state hydrocarbon company controlling all oil and gas operations. International partners operate under production-sharing agreements.
QatarEnergy — państwowe, operates the world's largest LNG facility at Ras Laffan Industrial City. North Field — the world's largest non-associated gas field.
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change — środowiskowy regulator. KAHRAMAA — electricity and water utility. Qatar National Vision 2030 — the national strategic framework.

Qatar is an absolute monarchy — the Emir governs by decree. Advisory Shura Council (45 members, 30 elected since 2021) has limited legislative power. International channels: GCC, OPEC (Qatar withdrew 2019 but re-engaged), COP process.

RO.s: członek UE gospodarka ($382.6B PKB). Produkcja na poziomie 13.2% PKB. Renty gazowe 0.53%, oil 0.38%. Usługi na poziomie 62.6%. Significant forestry issues — illegal logging in old-growth Carpathian forests despite członek UEship.

sectors.w: Romania's large-scale agricultural land consolidation has created monoculture on former smallholdings. Gdy soil health data is linked to EU CAP payments, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme conditionality. Gdy subsidy payments depend on crop rotation and soil health metrics, nakładający się interes w exhaustive monoculture słabnie.
Per-farm soil health monitoring through APIA (Agency for Payments and Intervention in Agriculture). Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Grain monoculture degrades Romania's fertile black-earth soils. Cover cropping and crop rotation reduce zależność systemowa.
a: Report illegal logging to Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură
Zgłosić do Garda Forestieră (Forest Guard)
Udokumentować przez Agent Green or EuroNatur
Large agricultural companies: Wdrożyć EU eco-schemes
Holzindustrie Schweighofer (now HS Timber): Przyjąć certified sustainable sourcing
Agricultural associations: Przyjąć soil health targets
APIA: Condition CAP payments on eco-scheme compliance
Ministry of Environment: Wzmocnić Forest Code enforcement
ANPM (National Environmental Protection Agency): Expand monitoring
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Deputat in the Camera Deputaților (330 members) or Senator in the Senat (136 members) by zażądać Forest Code enforcement
Submit EU Pilot complaints on illegal logging through European Commission
Support ECA (European Court of Auditors) reviews of CAP implementation
Wspierać przez European Parliament for Carpathian old-growth forest protection
i: Garda Forestieră — Romania's forest guard, responsible for enforcing the Forest Code. Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură — state forestry inspectorate. Agent Green — Romanian środowiskowy NGO documenting illegal logging.
Romania has significant foreign-owned agricultural land. HS Timber (formerly Holzindustrie Schweighofer) — major timber processor, previously linked to illegal logging controversies.
APIA (Agenția de Plăți și Intervenție pentru Agricultură) — manages EU CAP payments. ANPM — środowiskowy protection agency. Ministry of Environment, Waters and Forests.
Parlamentul României — bicameral: Camera Deputaților (330 members) and Senat (136 members). członek UE since 2007. Contact through cdep.ro and senat.ro.

RS.s: Western Balkan gospodarka ($90.1B PKB). Produkcja na poziomie 12.7%. Renty węglowe 0.24% PKB — but coal supplies ~70% of electricity. kandydat do UE country. Mining sector growing (Rio Tinto lithium project controversy).

sectors.w: Serbia's lignite dependence (Nikola Tesla power plants — among Europe's worst SO₂ emitters) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make lignite uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring LCPD/IED compliance. Retrofitting Nikola Tesla A and B to meet EU emission limits costs more than replacement with renewables.
Per-plant emisje and health cost data. HEAL (Health and Environment Alliance) has documented thousands of premature deaths. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Nie do złamania. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury.
a: Zgłosić do Ministry of Environmental Protection
Udokumentować przez CEKOR (Center for Ecology and Sustainable Opracowaćment)
Report through EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) channels
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije): Opracować lignite phase-out roadmap
Inwestować w solar and wind capacity
Plan just transition for Kolubara górnictwo basin communities
AERS (Energy Agency): Zreformować tariffs to reflect środowiskowy costs
Ministry of Mining and Energy: Przyjąć Energy Community Decarbonization Roadmap
Energy Community Secretariat: Egzekwować compliance
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Narodni poslanik in the Narodna skupština (250 members) by zażądać a coal phase-out timeline
Support EU accession środowiskowy chapter benchmarks
Wspierać przez Energy Community for binding decarbonization targets
Naciskać na EU Just Transition Fund pre-accession support
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — organ ochrony środowiska. CEKOR — Serbian środowiskowy NGO. RES Foundation — energia odnawialna advocacy.
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) — state electricity utility operating Nikola Tesla A (1650 MW) and B (1240 MW) lignite plants. Kolubara górnictwo basin — supplies lignite to these plants.
AERS (Agencija za energetiku Republike Srbije) — regulator energii. Serbia is an Energy Community Treaty member, requiring alignment with EU energy acquis.
Narodna skupština (National Assembly) — unicameral, 250 members. kandydat do UE country since 2012. Energy Community Treaty member.

RU.s: Major hydrocarbon gospodarka ($2,173.8B PKB). Renty naftowe 9.67%, gas rents 5.86%, coal 0.61%, górnictwo 2.05% PKB. World's largest gas exporter, second-largest oil exporter. Wydatki wojskowe 7.05% PKB. Authoritarian governance under international sankcje since 2022.

sectors.w: Russia's oil and gas revenues have been severely constrained by Western sankcje and price caps since 2022. Buyer diversification (EU pivot away from Russian gas) is actively breaking the nakładający się interes.
bp: Buyer diversification already underway. EU reduced Russian gas imports from ~40% to ~15% of supply. Gdy importers eliminate dependence, nakładający się interes w Russian fossil fuels breaks.
Sanctions-enforced przejrzystość — G7 price cap mechanism requires attestation of pricing. This partially makes W computable, though enforcement gaps remain.
Nie do złamania. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ regardless of source.
a: Report through international channels (Bellona Foundation, Global Witness)
Provide data to sankcje enforcement authorities
Udokumentować przez investigative journalism networks (iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe)
International oil companies that exited Russia: Maintain divestment
Shipping companies: Comply with price cap attestation requirements
Insurance companies: Egzekwować sankcje compliance on Russian oil cargoes
G7 price cap coalition: Wzmocnić enforcement against evasion
EU: Close sankcje loopholes on refined products
IMO (International Maritime Organization): Address dark fleet safety risks
Support and strengthen international sankcje on Russian fossil fuel revenues
Advocate for G7 price cap enforcement strengthening
Naciskać na addressing Russia's shadow fleet środowiskowy risks in Arctic and Baltic
Support EU energy diversification to permanently reduce Russian gas dependence
i: Note: Russia's domestic społeczeństwo obywatelskie is severely repressed. Bellona Foundation (Norway-based) — documents Russian środowiskowy issues. iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe — independent Russian media operating from exile.
Gazprom — state gas monopoly. Rosneft — state oil company. Most Western majors (Shell, BP, ExxonMobil) have exited Russian operations since 2022.
G7 Russian Oil Price Cap Coalition — enforces $60/barrel cap through insurance and shipping services. EU sankcje packages (14+ rounds). OFAC (US), OFSI (UK) — sankcje enforcement.

Note: Russia's Federal Assembly (Federalnoye Sobraniye — State Duma 450 members, Federation Council 170 members) does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: G7/G20 (Russia suspended from G8), UN General Assembly, international sankcje coalitions.

RW.s: Small East African gospodarka ($14.3B PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 24.6% PKB. Renty leśne 3.97%. Usługi na poziomie 47.6%. Remarkable post-genocide development but autorytarny governance. Strong środowiskowy policy (plastic bag ban pioneer).

sectors.w: Rwanda's hillside agriculture on steep terrain causes erosion and degradacja gleb. Gdy soil erosion data is linked to agricultural output per district, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Terracing and agroforestry expansion. Rwanda already has extensive terracing programs — extending to all cultivated hillsides with measurable soil retention targets breaks the nakładający się interes.
Per-district soil erosion monitoring linked to agricultural productivity data. Rwanda's strong data infrastructure supports this. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Hillside cultivation on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Terracing and contour farming reduce but cannot eliminate zależność systemowa.
a: Zgłosić do REMA (Rwanda Environment Management Authority)
Udokumentować przez RAB (Rwanda Agriculture and Animal Resources Opracowaćment Board)
Report through district agronomist offices
Agricultural cooperatives: Przyjąć terracing and cover cropping standards
Coffee and tea exporters: Require sustainable hillside cultivation practices
NAEB (National Agricultural Export Opracowaćment Board): Integrate soil health into export quality standards
MINAGRI (Ministry of Agriculture): Expand terracing programs to all cultivated slopes
REMA: Egzekwować hillside protection zones
RLMUA (Rwanda Land Management and Use Authority): Integrate erosion data into land management
Engage through available parlamentarny channels — note that Rwanda's legislature has limited independence from the executive
Support Great Lakes środowiskowy cooperation through ICGLR (International Conference on the Great Lakes Region)
Advocate for climate adaptation funding for hillside agriculture through Green Climate Fund
Support African Union środowiskowy governance frameworks
i: REMA — the środowiskowy management authority. RAB — agricultural research and extension. Rwanda has strong institutional capacity relative to income level.
NAEB — manages agricultural export promotion (coffee, tea, pyrethrum). Rwanda's agricultural sector is organized through cooperatives and imihigo (performance contracts).
MINAGRI — agriculture ministry. RLMUA — land use authority. Rwanda's Vision 2050 includes środowiskowy sustainability targets.

Inteko Ishinga Amategeko (Parliament) — bicameral: Chamber of Deputies (80 members) and Senate (26 members). Note: Rwanda is effectively a one-party dominant state under RPF (Rwandan Patriotic Front). International channels: EAC (East African Community), AU, ICGLR.

SD.s: Conflict-affected gospodarka ($49.7B PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 22.2% PKB. Mining 6.63% (gold). Renty naftowe 3.3% (reduced after South Sudan's independence). Civil war since April 2023 between SAF and RSF. Humanitarian catastrophe.

sectors.w: Sudan's artisanal gold górnictwo uses mercury extensively and generates revenue streams funding armed groups. Gdy gold revenue flows are traced, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: International supply chain due diligence blocking conflict gold. Gdy refiners verify provenance, the nakładający się interes between armed groups and gold revenues słabnie.
Tracing gold flows from artisanal mines to international markets. LBMA (London Bullion Market Association) responsible sourcing standards provide the framework. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Artisanal górnictwo uses mercury (Minamata Convention violation). Mercury-free processing methods exist but require investment.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations (UN Panel of Experts on Sudan)
Udokumentować przez INGO networks (Global Witness, IPIS)
Provide data to LBMA on gold provenance
International gold refiners: Wdrożyć enhanced due diligence on Sudanese gold
UAE gold traders: Apply LBMA responsible sourcing for Sudan-origin gold
Insurance and logistics companies: Screen for conflict-linked gold shipments
LBMA: Add Sudan to high-risk origin list
UAE authorities: Enhance customs screening for Sudanese gold
International sankcje bodies: Target RSF gold revenue streams
Support UN Security Council sankcje on conflict gold flows
Advocate for enhanced LBMA responsible sourcing enforcement
Naciskać na UAE cooperation on gold trade przejrzystość
Support Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal górnictwo
i: Note: Sudan is in active civil war. No functioning domestic oversight exists. UN Panel of Experts — monitors sankcje and conflict dynamics. IPIS (International Peace Information Service) — tracks artisanal górnictwo and conflict resources.
Sudan's gold primarily flows through UAE (Dubai) trading hubs. LBMA — sets responsible sourcing standards for gold refiners worldwide.
LBMA — London Bullion Market Association, responsible sourcing standard-setter. FATF (Financial Action Task Force) — can designate jurisdictions for gold laundering risks.

Note: Sudan's transitional government collapsed with the April 2023 war. No functioning legislature. International channels: UN Security Council, AU (African Union Peace and Security Council), IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on Opracowaćment).

SE.s: Advanced Nordic gospodarka ($603.7B PKB). Produkcja na poziomie 13% PKB. Mining 1% PKB (iron ore — LKAB is Europe's largest). Usługi na poziomie 66.4%. Strong środowiskowy regulations. członek UE. Leading in green steel transition (HYBRIT).

sectors.w: Sweden's iron ore górnictwo (LKAB) in northern Sweden affects Sami reindeer herding land and generates tailings. Gdy na kopalnię środowiskowy and indigenous impact data is published alongside production, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Full internalization of indigenous land-use costs and środowiskowy remediation. Gdy LKAB pays for herding disruption and tailings management, nakładający się interes w low-cost extraction słabnie.
Per-mine środowiskowy disclosure including impacts on Sami land use. LKAB publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verified indigenous impact assessments makes W computable.

Częściowo łamalne. HYBRIT (Hydrogen Breakthrough Ironmaking Technology) — SSAB/LKAB/Vattenfall joint venture — is producing fossil-free steel, demonstrating that górnictwo's downstream zależność systemowa on carbon-intensive processing can be broken.
a: Zgłosić do Naturvårdsverket (Swedish Environmental Protection Agency)
Zgłosić do Bergsstaten (Mining Inspectorate of Sweden)
Udokumentować przez Sametinget (Sami Parliament) channels
LKAB: Accelerate HYBRIT fossil-free iron and steel
SSAB: Scale fossil-free steel production
Boliden: Wdrożyć enhanced tailings management and water recycling
Bergsstaten: Wzmocnić środowiskowy conditions in górnictwo permits
Mark- och miljödomstolarna (Land and Environment Courts): Apply rigorous środowiskowy review
SGU: Integrate indigenous land-use data into górnictwo assessments
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Riksdagsledamot in the Riksdag (349 members) by zażądać indigenous consent requirements in górnictwo permits
Wspierać przez EU Critical Raw Materials Act for środowiskowy and indigenous rights safeguards
Support Nordic Council cooperation on Sami rights across borders
Naciskać na EU taxonomy alignment of górnictwo środowiskowy standards
i: Naturvårdsverket — środowiskowy protection agency. Bergsstaten — the górnictwo inspectorate, part of SGU (Sveriges geologiska undersökning — Geological Survey of Sweden). Sametinget — the Sami Parliament, representing indigenous Sami rights.

LKAB — państwowe iron ore company, Europe's largest. SSAB — steel producer, partner in HYBRIT. Boliden — base metals górnictwo and smelting company. HYBRIT — world's first fossil-free steel initiative.
Mark- och miljödomstolarna — specialized środowiskowy courts. Sweden's Minerals Act (Minerallagen) governs górnictwo permits.
Riksdag — unicameral parliament, 349 members. Contact through riksdagen.se. Sweden is a monarchia konstytucyjna and członek UE.

SG.s: Advanced city-state gospodarka ($547.4B PKB). Usługi na poziomie 73% PKB. Produkcja na poziomie 16.3% (electronics, petrochemicals). No natural resources. Major petrochemical refining hub and global financial center. World's busiest transshipment port.

sectors.w: Singapore is a major petrochemical refining and trading hub — the 'Houston of Asia.' Gdy refinery emisje and fossil fuel trading flows are disclosed per facility, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Carbon tax escalation (Singapore's podatek węglowy rises to S$25/tCO₂ in 2024, S$45 in 2026, S$50-80 by 2030). Gdy refining margins incorporate carbon costs, nakładający się interes w unpriced emisje słabnie.
Per-refinery emisje and trade-flow disclosure. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) climate disclosure requirements extend to financial flows. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Petrochemical refining inherently emits. However, Singapore's investment in sustainable aviation fuel and green hydrogen can reduce zależność systemowa over time.
a: Zgłosić do NEA (National Environment Agency)
Report through MAS sygnalista channels for financial misconduct
Udokumentować przez SGX (Singapore Exchange) disclosure requirements
Shell, ExxonMobil (Jurong Island): Wdrożyć carbon capture at refineries
Banks (DBS, OCBC, UOB): Apply coal financing phase-out policies
Petrochemical companies: Inwestować w green hydrogen and sustainable feedstocks
NEA: Accelerate podatek węglowy escalation timeline
MAS: Wzmocnić climate-related financial disclosure (TCFD alignment)
EMA (Energy Market Authority): Mandate energia odnawialna targets
Engage through available parlamentarny channels — Members of Parliament (93 elected, up to 12 non-constituency/nominated)
Support ASEAN środowiskowy cooperation frameworks
Wspierać przez Singapore's Green Finance Action Plan for regional decarbonization
Naciskać na IMO shipping emisje standards (Singapore is world's largest bunkering port)
i: NEA (National Environment Agency) — środowiskowy regulator. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) — financial regulator with expanding climate disclosure mandate. SGX — Singapore Exchange, requires climate reporting.
Jurong Island — Singapore's petrochemical hub hosting Shell, ExxonMobil, and other major refineries. DBS, OCBC, UOB — Singapore's three major banks with significant fossil fuel financing exposure.
EMA (Energy Market Authority) — regulator energii. Singapore Green Plan 2030 — national sustainability framework. Carbon tax administered by NEA under Carbon Pricing Act.

Parliament of Singapore — unicameral. Singapore is a parlamentarny republic with dominant-party governance (PAP — People's Action Party). Note: limited political pluralism in practice. International channels: ASEAN (founding member), IMO, UNFCCC.

SI.s: Small członek UE gospodarka ($73B PKB). Produkcja na poziomie 19.4% PKB. Usługi na poziomie 57.9%. Significant forest cover (60%+ of territory). członek UE since 2004. Former Yugoslav republic with strong środowiskowy awareness.

sectors.w: Slovenia's intensive agriculture in lowland areas (Pomurje, Podravje) relies on monoculture grain and livestock. Gdy soil and water quality data is linked to CAP payments, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme implementation. Gdy subsidy payments require biodiversity and soil health measures, nakładający się interes w exhaustive monoculture słabnie.
Per-farm soil and water quality monitoring through ARSKTRP (Agency for Agricultural Markets and Rural Opracowaćment). Czyni W obliczalnym.

Częściowo łamalne. Grain monoculture and intensive livestock farming degrade soil and pollute groundwater. Organic farming and crop rotation reduce dependence — Slovenia already has 11%+ organic farming share.
a: Zgłosić do ARSO (Agencija Republike Slovenije za okolje — Environment Agency)
Zgłosić do Inšpektorat za kmetijstvo (Agricultural Inspectorate)
Udokumentować przez Slovenian środowiskowy organizations (Focus, Umanotera)
Agricultural cooperatives: Przyjąć organic and integrated farming practices
Dairy industry: Wdrożyć manure management standards
Food processors: Source from diversified farming operations
Ministry of Agriculture: Wzmocnić CAP eco-scheme implementation
ARSO: Egzekwować nitrate directive compliance
ARSKTRP: Condition payments on biodiversity measures
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Poslanec in the Državni zbor (90 members) by zażądać stronger CAP eco-scheme implementation
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
Wspierać przez Alpine Convention for sustainable mountain agriculture
i: ARSO — the Environment Agency of Slovenia. Umanotera — Slovenian Foundation for Sustainable Opracowaćment. Focus — środowiskowy NGO.
Slovenia's agricultural sector is dominated by small family farms (average 7 hectares). Kmetijsko gozdarska zbornica (Chamber of Agriculture and Forestry) — industry association.
ARSKTRP (Agencija za kmetijske trge in razvoj podeželja) — manages CAP payments. Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Food — policy ministry.
Državni zbor (National Assembly) — 90 members. Državni svet (National Council) — 40 members, advisory role. członek UE since 2004. Alpine Convention member. Contact through dz-rs.si.

SK.s: Central European członek UE ($140.9B PKB). Produkcja na poziomie 16.3% PKB — heavily auto-dependent (Volkswagen, Kia, Stellantis). Usługi na poziomie 60%. członek UE since 2004. World's largest per-capita car producer.

sectors.w: Slovakia's food processing industry produces significant ultra-processed food for regional markets. Gdy per-product health impact data (obesity, diabetes correlations) is disclosed alongside marketing spend, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: EU front-of-pack labeling (Nutri-Score or equivalent). Gdy consumers can identify ultra-processing, nakładający się interes w opaque ingredient lists słabnie.
Mandatory per-product health impact disclosure. Slovakia has rising obesity rates (20%+). Linking UPF consumption data to health outcomes makes W computable.
Nie do złamania. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value and adds synthetic additives.
a: Zgłosić do ŠVPS (Štátna veterinárna a potravinová správa — State Veterinary and Food Administration)
Zgłosić do ÚVZ SR (Úrad verejného zdravotníctva — Public Health Authority)
Udokumentować przez consumer protection organizations
Food processors: Zreformowaćulate to reduce ultra-processing
Retailers (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco): Przyjąć front-of-pack labeling
Advertisers: Restrict UPF marketing to children
Ministry of Health: Wdrożyć front-of-pack nutrition labeling
ŠVPS: Wzmocnić food composition standards
Ministry of Agriculture: Support local food production incentives
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Poslanec in the Národná rada (150 members) by zażądać mandatory front-of-pack labeling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy UPF reduction targets
Wspierać przez WHO Europe for ultra-processed food regulation
i: ŠVPS — the food safety authority. ÚVZ SR — public health authority monitoring dietary health outcomes.
Slovakia's food retail is dominated by international chains (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco, Billa). Slovenská poľnohospodárska a potravinárska komora — food industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — oversees dietary health policy. Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Opracowaćment — food production policy.
Národná rada Slovenskej republiky (National Council) — unicameral, 150 members. członek UE since 2004. Contact through nrsr.sk.

SN.s: West African gospodarka ($32.8B PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 16.6% PKB. Mining 2.9% (phosphates, gold, zircon). Offshore oil and gas discoveries (Sangomar field — first oil expected). Rybołówstwo crucial for food security. Democracy with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Senegal's fisheries face severe przełowienie by foreign industrial fleets (EU, China) competing with artisanal pirogues. Gdy per-vessel catch data is published alongside stock assessments, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Zreformować fishing access agreements to limit foreign industrial fleet catch. Gdy EU and Chinese DWF (Distant Water Fleet) quotas reflect stock sustainability, nakładający się interes w przełowienie słabnie.
VMS (Vessel Monitoring System) data publication and per-vessel catch reporting. Senegal has invested in MCS (Monitoring, Control and Surveillance). Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Industrial trawling damages benthic habitats. Artisanal fishing with selective gear reduces zależność systemowa.
a: Zgłosić do DPSP (Direction de la Protection et de la Surveillance des Pêches)
Udokumentować przez ICSF (International Collective in Support of Fishworkers)
Report IUU (Illegal, Unreported, Unregulated) fishing to CNSP (Centre National de Surveillance des Pêches)
Foreign fishing companies: Comply with Senegalese fishing access terms
Fish processing companies: Przyjąć sustainable sourcing certification (MSC)
Artisanal fishing cooperatives: Support co-management of nearshore zones
Ministry of Rybołówstwo: Zreformować fishing access agreements with EU and China
CRODT (Centre de Recherches Océanographiques de Dakar-Thiaroye): Publish stock assessments
CSRP (Sub-Regional Rybołówstwo Commission): Coordinate regional management
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Député in the Assemblée nationale (165 members) by zażądać reform of foreign fishing access agreements
Support CSRP regional fisheries management plans
Wspierać przez AU-IBAR for African fisheries sovereignty
Naciskać na RFMO (Regional Rybołówstwo Management Organization) quotas reflecting stock sustainability
i: DPSP — fisheries protection directorate. CNSP — national fisheries surveillance center, operates patrol vessels. Senegal has one of West Africa's most developed fisheries monitoring systems.
Senegal's fisheries employ ~600,000 people. Artisanal pirogues (wooden boats) land ~80% of total catch. GAIPES — fish exporters association.
Ministry of Rybołówstwo and Maritime Economy. CRODT — oceanographic research center providing stock assessments. CSRP — sub-regional fisheries commission for West Africa.

Assemblée nationale du Sénégal — unicameral, 165 members. Senegal is a presidential republic with a strong democratic tradition (peaceful power transitions in 2000, 2012, 2024). Contact through assemblee-nationale.sn.

SO.s: Fragile state ($12B PKB). Limited economic data available. Renty leśne 11.24% PKB (charcoal — major wylesianie driver). Charcoal trade linked to Al-Shabaab financing. Ongoing conflict and state fragility.

sectors.w: Somalia's charcoal production devastates acacia forests and finances armed groups. Gdy charcoal trade flows are traced and linked to wylesianie data, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: UN Security Council charcoal export ban enforcement (Resolution 2036). Gdy the ban is effectively enforced, the nakładający się interes between Al-Shabaab revenue and charcoal trade słabnie.
Satellite wylesianie monitoring linked to charcoal trade routes. UN Monitoring Group has documented the flows. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Nie do złamania. Charcoal production from slow-growing acacia in arid Somali climate causes irreversible desertification.
a: Zgłosić do UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea
Udokumentować przez Somali środowiskowy organizations where operational
Report charcoal shipments to naval forces (EU NAVFOR, Combined Maritime Forces)
Shipping companies: Screen for Somali charcoal cargoes
Gulf state importers (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman): Egzekwować import bans on Somali charcoal
Alternative energy providers: Inwestować w LPG distribution as charcoal substitute
Federal Government of Somalia: Egzekwować charcoal export ban
Gulf state customs: Screen for Somali charcoal imports
UN SEMG: Wzmocnić monitoring of charcoal trade networks
Support UN Security Council charcoal ban enforcement
Advocate for Gulf state cooperation on import screening
Naciskać na alternative livelihoods funding through UN Somalia programs
Support Somali Disaster Resilience Institute środowiskowy programs
i: UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea — monitors sankcje including the charcoal ban. EU NAVFOR (Operation Atalanta) — maritime security operation. Note: domestic institutional capacity is extremely limited.
Somali charcoal is primarily exported to Gulf states via dhow networks. UAE has been the largest market. Some companies are promoting LPG as an alternative cooking fuel.
Federal Government of Somalia — limited authority outside Mogadishu. Federal Member States have varying governance capacity. UN sankcje framework provides the primary regulatory tool.

Federal Parliament of Somalia — bicameral: House of the People (275 members) and Upper House (54 members). Note: clan-based indirect elections, limited institutional capacity. International channels: UN, AU (ATMIS — AU Transition Mission in Somalia), IGAD.

SV.s: Small Central American gospodarka ($35.4B PKB). Usługi na poziomie 61% PKB. Rolnictwo na poziomie 4.4%. Produkcja na poziomie 12%. Significant remittance dependence (~24% of PKB). Bitcoin adopted as legal tender (2021). State of exception since 2022.

sectors.w: El Salvador's sugarcane monoculture in coastal lowlands is linked to chronic kidney disease of unknown etiology (CKDu) among agricultural workers — one of the highest rates globally. Gdy CKDu data is linked to agrochemical exposure per farm, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Agrochemical regulation and worker health monitoring. Gdy sugarcane operations internalize CKDu health costs, nakładający się interes w unregulated pesticide/herbicide use słabnie.
Per-farm agrochemical use and worker health outcome data. El Salvador has the world's highest CKDu mortality. Linking these datasets makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Sugarcane monoculture depletes soils and concentrates agrochemical exposure. Crop diversification and organic practices reduce zależność systemowa.
a: Zgłosić do MARN (Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales)
Document worker health impacts through ISSS (Instituto Salvadoreño del Seguro Social)
Zgłosić do MAG (Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería)
Sugar mills (ingenios): Wdrożyć worker heat stress and agrochemical exposure protocols
Przyjąć mechanized harvesting to reduce worker field exposure
Inwestować w worker kidney screening programs
Ministry of Health: Establish CKDu surveillance and prevention program
MARN: Regulate agrochemical use in sugarcane production
MAG: Support crop diversification away from monoculture sugarcane
Engage through available legislative channels — Asamblea Legislativa (84 members); note concentrated executive power under current governance
Support SICA (Central American Integration System) regional CKDu response
Wspierać przez PAHO/WHO for CKDu research and prevention funding
Naciskać na ILO conventions on agricultural worker health protection
i: MARN — Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources. ISSS — social security institute. MAG — agriculture ministry. La Isla Network — international NGO documenting CKDu in Central America.
El Salvador's sugar industry is concentrated among a few large ingenios (sugar mills). CAMAGRO (Cámara Agropecuaria y Agroindustrial) — agricultural industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — responsible for CKDu response. MARN — środowiskowy regulation.
Asamblea Legislativa — unicameral, 84 members. Note: since 2021, executive dominance over legislature; limited separation of powers in practice. International channels: SICA, PAHO, ILO.

SY.s: War-devastated gospodarka ($23.6B PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 43.1% PKB — unusually high due to industrial collapse. Renty naftowe 4.02%, gas 2.33%. Civil war since 2011 has destroyed infrastructure. Ongoing political transition (2024-2025).

sectors.w: Syria's oil infrastructure has been contested between factions (SDF/AANES controls northeastern fields, former regime controlled refineries). Gdy oil revenue flows are transparently traced through reconstruction, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Post-conflict transparent governance of oil revenues. Gdy reconstruction frameworks require accountable revenue management, nakładający się interes w opaque extraction słabnie.
Oil revenue flow przejrzystość as condition of reconstruction assistance and sankcje relief. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Oil infrastructure has been extensively damaged — reconstruction offers opportunity to build in środowiskowy standards.
