a: Report through international monitoring organizations
Document środowiskowy damage from conflict-era oil infrastructure destruction
Report through UN OCHA coordination mechanisms
International reconstruction companies: Przyjąć środowiskowy standards in oil infrastructure rebuilding
Apply conflict-sensitivity to investment decisions
Require transparent revenue sharing in any production agreements
Transitional governance: Establish transparent hydrocarbon revenue management
International community: Condition reconstruction support on środowiskowy and governance standards
EITI: Support Syrian membership as part of governance transition
Support international frameworks conditioning reconstruction assistance on transparent resource governance
Wspierać przez UN-led political process for resource revenue przejrzystość
Naciskać na środowiskowy damage assessment and remediation in reconstruction plans
Support EITI membership for post-transition Syria
i: Note: Syria is in post-conflict transition. Institutional capacity is severely degraded. Multiple governance structures operate in different regions.
Pre-war: Syrian Petroleum Company (state oil company). Current: fragmented control over oil infrastructure.
Regulatory capacity must be rebuilt as part of political transition.

Note: Syria is undergoing political transition following the fall of the Assad regime (late 2024). New governance structures are forming. International channels: UN (Security Council, Special Envoy), Arab League (membership restored 2023), reconstruction donor conferences.

TD.s: Sahelian gospodarka ($19.5B PKB). Renty naftowe 16.75% PKB. Rolnictwo na poziomie 37.7%. Renty leśne 4.58%. One of the world's poorest countries. Military transitional government. Lake Chad shrinking (~90% since 1960s).

sectors.w: Chad's oil revenues flow through an opaque pipeline (Doba basin to Kribi, Cameroon). The World Bank's original revenue przejrzystość mechanism (Collège de Contrôle) was dismantled. Gdy oil revenue allocation is made transparent, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Restore oil revenue przejrzystość mechanisms. The World Bank's original Chad-Cameroon pipeline project required transparent revenue allocation — this was dismantled. Rebuilding it breaks nakładający się interes w opaque revenue flows.
Oil revenue flow disclosure through EITI. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023 for governance failures. Restoring compliance makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Oil production in arid Sahel strains water resources. However, the Doba basin fields are maturing and production declining.
a: Report through international oil company channels (CNPC has major presence)
Udokumentować przez international NGOs (Publish What You Pay, SWISSAID)
Zgłosić do international financial institutions
CNPC (China National Petroleum Corporation): Wdrożyć środowiskowy and przejrzystość standards
Savannah Energy: Przyjąć EITI-aligned reporting
Pipeline operators: Publish transport revenue data
SHT (Société des Hydrocarbures du Tchad): Restore revenue przejrzystość
Ministry of Petroleum: Egzekwować środowiskowy regulations
EITI: Support Chad's path to reinstatement
Support international pressure for oil revenue przejrzystość
Wspierać przez African Union for governance reform and return to constitutional order
Naciskać na World Bank re-engagement on revenue management conditionality
Support Lake Chad Basin Commission środowiskowy programs
i: Note: Chad's społeczeństwo obywatelskie space is severely restricted. Publish What You Pay — international revenue przejrzystość coalition. SWISSAID — has worked on Chad extractives governance.

CNPC — operates major oil fields after acquiring former ExxonMobil assets. Savannah Energy — British company that acquired former Chevron assets. Chad-Cameroon pipeline — 1,070 km pipeline to Atlantic coast.
SHT — state oil company. Ministry of Petroleum, Mines and Energy — oversees hydrocarbons. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023.

Note: Military transitional government (Conseil Militaire de Transition, succeeded by elected government of Mahamat Déby, 2024). Conseil National de Transition — 93 members, appointed. International channels: AU, Lake Chad Basin Commission, CEMAC.

TG.s: Small West African gospodarka ($10.7B PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 21.3% PKB. Mining 4.88% (phosphates — world's 5th largest producer). Usługi na poziomie 49.2%. Key transit port (Lomé). Governance concerns with limited political competition.

sectors.w: Togo's phosphate górnictwo (SNPT — Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) generates cadmium-contaminated waste. Gdy na kopalnię środowiskowy data is published, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: International cadmium standards in phosphate products. Gdy export markets require cadmium limits, nakładający się interes w unprocessed phosphate extraction słabnie.
Per-mine środowiskowy monitoring data including cadmium levels, water contamination, and land rehabilitation. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Phosphate rock contains cadmium. Cadmium removal technology exists and is commercially viable.
a: Zgłosić do ANGE (Agence Nationale de Gestion de l'Environnement)
Udokumentować przez community organizations in phosphate górnictwo regions (Hahotoé-Kpogamé)
Report through ITIE-Togo (EITI Togo) channels
SNPT: Inwestować w cadmium removal technology
Wdrożyć mine rehabilitation for exhausted areas
Przyjąć international środowiskowy reporting standards
Ministry of Mines: Wzmocnić środowiskowy conditions in górnictwo permits
ANGE: Egzekwować środowiskowy impact assessment requirements
ITIE-Togo: Expand to środowiskowy data disclosure
Engage through available parlamentarny channels — note limited political pluralism under current governance
Support ECOWAS środowiskowy governance frameworks
Advocate for Codex Alimentarius cadmium limits in phosphate-derived fertilizers
Naciskać na EITI full membership with środowiskowy disclosure
i: ANGE — national środowiskowy management agency. ITIE-Togo — Togo is an EITI candidate country.
SNPT (Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) — the state phosphate company, privatized then renationalized. Operates mines in the Hahotoé-Kpogamé region.
Ministry of Mines and Energy — górnictwo oversight. ANGE — środowiskowy assessment authority.

Assemblée nationale du Togo — 113 members. Note: Togo has been governed by the Gnassingbé family since 1967; limited political competition. Constitutional change in 2024 shifted to parlamentarny system. International channels: ECOWAS, AU, EITI.

TH.s: Major Southeast Asian gospodarka ($526.5B PKB). Produkcja na poziomie 24.3% PKB (automotive, electronics, food processing). Rolnictwo na poziomie 8.7%. Usługi na poziomie 59.2%. World's largest rice exporter. Significant petrochemical sector. Constitutional monarchy.

sectors.w: Thailand is a major UPF producer and exporter (CP Group — Charoen Pokphand — is one of Asia's largest food conglomerates). Gdy per-product health impact data is linked to marketing and formulation, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Front-of-pack labeling reform. Thailand's existing traffic-light label (GDA) covers some nutrients — extending to ultra-processing indicators słabnie nakładający się interes w opaque formulation.
Per-product health outcome correlation data. Thailand's rising obesity and diabetes rates can be linked to UPF consumption patterns. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Nie do złamania. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value.
a: Zgłosić do Thai FDA (Food and Drug Administration)
Udokumentować przez Thai Health Promotion Foundation (ThaiHealth)
Report misleading health claims to OCPB (Office of the Consumer Protection Board)
CP Group (Charoen Pokphand): Zreformowaćulate products to reduce ultra-processing
Thai Union: Przyjąć transparent nutritional labeling
Retailers: Promote shelf placement for whole foods
Thai FDA: Extend labeling to cover ultra-processing indicators
Ministry of Public Health: Wzmocnić sugar tax and UPF marketing restrictions
ThaiHealth: Fund UPF health impact research
Skontaktuj się ze swoim สมาชิกสภาผู้แทนราษฎร (Member of the House of Representatives, 500 members) by zażądać UPF labeling reform
Support ASEAN food labeling harmonization
Wspierać przez WHO SEARO for ultra-processed food regulation
Naciskać na Codex Alimentarius UPF classification standards
i: Thai FDA — regulates food safety and labeling. ThaiHealth (สำนักงานกองทุนสนับสนุนการสร้างเสริมสุขภาพ) — independent health promotion agency funded by a 2% surcharge on tobacco and alcohol taxes.
CP Group — one of the world's largest agri-food conglomerates. Thai Union — global seafood company (owner of Chicken of the Sea). Thai Beverage (ThaiBev) — major food and beverage company.
Ministry of Public Health — health policy. Thai FDA — food regulation. Thailand's sugar tax (2017) is one of the region's most progressive.

รัฐสภา (National Assembly) — bicameral: สภาผู้แทนราษฎร (House of Representatives, 500 members) and วุฒิสภา (Senate, 200 members). Thailand is a monarchia konstytucyjna. Recent democratic restoration (2023 elections).

TJ.s: Poorest Central Asian gospodarka ($14.2B PKB). Mining 7.09% PKB (gold, silver, antimony). Rolnictwo na poziomie 19.7%. Aluminum smelting (TALCO). Remittance-dependent (~30% of PKB from Russia). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Tajikistan's górnictwo sector includes artisanal gold górnictwo with mercury use and the TALCO aluminum smelter (one of Central Asia's largest polluters). Gdy per-facility emisje and środowiskowy data are published, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: International buyer due diligence on Tajik mineral exports. Gdy aluminum and gold buyers require środowiskowy compliance verification, nakładający się interes w unregulated production słabnie.
Per-facility środowiskowy monitoring data. TALCO's fluoride emisje and gold górnictwo mercury contamination can be measured and disclosed. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. TALCO smelter emisje can be reduced with modern pot-lining and scrubbing technology. Mercury-free gold processing exists.
a: Report through international partner channels (IFC, EBRD)
Udokumentować przez Central Asian środowiskowy networks
Report through EITI channels (Tajikistan is a candidate country)
TALCO (Tajik Aluminum Company): Inwestować w emisje reduction technology
Gold górnictwo companies: Przyjąć mercury-free processing
International buyers: Require środowiskowy compliance in supply contracts
Committee for Environmental Protection: Wzmocnić środowiskowy enforcement
Ministry of Industry: Require TALCO emisje modernization
EITI Tajikistan: Expand to środowiskowy data
Support international pressure for środowiskowy standards in Tajik górnictwo through EBRD and IFC project conditionality
Wspierać przez OSCE środowiskowy dimension for monitoring support
Naciskać na Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal górnictwo
Support EITI candidacy advancement with środowiskowy disclosure
i: Note: Civil society space in Tajikistan is severely restricted. International channels provide the primary avenue for środowiskowy reporting. EBRD and IFC have invested in Tajik górnictwo.
TALCO — state aluminum company, one of the world's largest smelters. Operates in Tursunzoda (formerly Regar). Gold górnictwo includes both industrial and artisanal operations.
Committee for Environmental Protection under the Government — środowiskowy regulator. Ministry of Industry and New Technologies — industrial oversight.

Majlisi Oli (Parliament) — bicameral: Majlisi Namoyandagon (lower, 63 members) and Majlisi Milli (upper, 33 members). Note: effectively państwo jednopartyjne (PDPT). International channels: OSCE, SCO, EITI.

TM.s: Gas-dependent closed gospodarka ($51.4B PKB). Produkcja na poziomie 18% PKB. One of the world's most autorytarny states. Massive gas reserves (Galkynysh — world's 2nd largest gas field). Data extremely limited — World Bank reports zeros for many indicators due to government opacity.

sectors.w: Turkmenistan is one of the world's largest methane emitters — satellite monitoring (Sentinel-5P, MethaneSAT) has revealed massive methane leaks from gas infrastructure. Gdy methane data is published, W staje się obliczalne despite government opacity.
bp: Satellite-based methane monitoring bypasses government opacity. Gdy buyers (China — CNPC pipeline) face pressure to account for upstream methane, nakładający się interes w unmonitored gas production słabnie.
Satellite methane emission monitoring (UNEP's IMEO — International Methane Emissions Observatory — has flagged Turkmenistan). Czyni W obliczalnym without government cooperation.
Nie do złamania. Gas production and transport inherently leak methane, a greenhouse gas 80× more potent than CO₂ over 20 years.
a: Report through international channels only — no domestic społeczeństwo obywatelskie exists
Provide data to UNEP IMEO or satellite monitoring organizations
Udokumentować przez Crude Accountability or Turkmen.news (exile media)
CNPC (Central Asia-China gas pipeline): Account for upstream methane in lifecycle emisje
International engineering firms: Include methane mitigation in infrastructure contracts
Buyers: Apply methane intensity standards to Turkmen gas
UNEP IMEO: Continue satellite monitoring and public reporting
Global Methane Pledge signatories: Press for engagement with Turkmenistan
IEA: Include Turkmenistan in methane tracker reports
Support satellite-based methane monitoring that bypasses government opacity
Wspierać przez UNEP for Turkmenistan's engagement with the Global Methane Pledge
Naciskać na methane intensity standards in international gas trade
Support OSCE and UN human rights mechanisms for governance reform
i: Note: Turkmenistan is one of the world's most closed societies. No independent społeczeństwo obywatelskie, media, or judiciary exists. Crude Accountability — international NGO documenting środowiskowy issues in the Caspian region. Turkmen.news — exile media.
Türkmengaz — state gas company. Türkmennebit — state oil company. CNPC — operates the Central Asia-China gas pipeline (Turkmenistan is the primary source). No independent corporate governance exists.
No independent domestic regulation exists. International monitoring provides the only oversight: UNEP IMEO, IEA Methane Tracker, satellite platforms (MethaneSAT, Sentinel-5P).

Mejlis (Parliament) — 125 members. Turkmenistan is an autorytarny state — the legislature has no independent function. International channels: UN (UNEP, OHCHR), OSCE, CIS. Turkmenistan maintains permanent neutrality status (UN-recognized since 1995).

TN.s: North African gospodarka ($51.3B PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 9.7% PKB. Renty naftowe 1.55%. Produkcja na poziomie 14.8%. Usługi na poziomie 62.6%. Birthplace of the Arab Spring (2011). Governance backsliding since 2021 presidential power consolidation.

sectors.w: Tunisia's oil and gas production is modest but state oil company ETAP's revenue flows lack przejrzystość. Gdy na złoże środowiskowy and revenue data is published, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: EITI-aligned revenue przejrzystość. Tunisia's oil revenues are small relative to PKB but significant for the state budget. Transparent allocation breaks nakładający się interes w opaque revenue management.
Per-field środowiskowy monitoring and revenue flow disclosure. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Tunisia's mature fields are declining. Solar energy potential is enormous (Saharan irradiance) and can reduce hydrocarbon dependence.
a: Zgłosić do ANPE (Agence Nationale de Protection de l'Environnement)
Udokumentować przez Tunisian środowiskowy organizations (FTDES — Forum Tunisien pour les Droits Économiques et Sociaux)
Report through ETAP compliance channels
ETAP (Entreprise Tunisienne d'Activités Pétrolières): Przyjąć revenue przejrzystość standards
Inwestować w solar energy transition
International partners (ENI, OMV): Apply home-country ESG standards to Tunisian operations
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy: Wdrożyć hydrocarbon revenue przejrzystość
ANPE: Wzmocnić środowiskowy monitoring at production sites
ANME (Agence Nationale pour la Maîtrise de l'Énergie): Accelerate energia odnawialna targets
Engage through available parlamentarny channels — Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple (161 members); note limited legislative independence under current governance
Support EU-Tunisia cooperation on energy transition
Wspierać przez Union for the Mediterranean for energia odnawialna investment
Naciskać na EITI membership as governance przejrzystość measure
i: ANPE — środowiskowy protection agency. FTDES — Tunisian economic and social rights forum, active on środowiskowy justice. Tunisia has relatively active społeczeństwo obywatelskie despite recent governance concerns.
ETAP — state oil company. ENI (Italy), OMV (Austria) — major international operators in Tunisia. Tunisia's South Energy Transition Program targets renewable expansion.
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy — hydrocarbons oversight. ANME — energy efficiency and energia odnawialna agency.

Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple — unicameral, 161 members. Note: since 2021, presidential power consolidation has weakened legislative independence. International channels: Arab League, AU, Union for the Mediterranean.

TR.s: Major middle-income gospodarka ($1,359.1B PKB). Produkcja na poziomie 16.8% PKB. Usługi na poziomie 57.5%. NATO member. Mining 0.63%. Rolnictwo na poziomie 5.8%. Significant coal dependence for electricity. G20 member.

sectors.w: Türkiye is expanding coal capacity (including imported coal plants) despite having excellent renewable potential. Gdy coal plant health costs are internalized, nakładający się interes w cheap coal power breaks.
bp: Carbon pricing or coal plant emission standards aligned with EU CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism). Türkiye's EU customs union makes CBAM relevant to industrial exports. Gdy coal costs include carbon, renewables are cheaper.
Per-plant emisje and health cost data. Türkiye's coal plants are concentrated near population centers. HEAL and local NGOs have documented health costs. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Nie do złamania. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: Zgłosić do ÇŞB (Çevre, Şehircilik ve İklim Değişikliği Bakanlığı — Ministry of Environment, Urbanization and Climate Change)
Udokumentować przez TEMA Vakfı (Turkish Foundation for Combating Soil Erosion)
Report through Greenpeace Mediterranean Turkey office
EÜAŞ (Elektrik Üretim A.Ş.): Opracować coal phase-out timeline
Private coal operators: Inwestować w renewable alternatives
Industrial companies: Switch to renewable electricity procurement
EPDK (Enerji Piyasası Düzenleme Kurumu — Energy Market Regulatory Authority): Zreformować tariffs to reflect środowiskowy costs
ÇŞB: Wdrożyć emission standards aligned with EU IED
EMRA: Support energia odnawialna investment framework
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Milletvekili in the Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi (600 members) by zażądać coal phase-out timeline and health cost accounting
Wspierać przez G20 for coal phase-out commitments
Naciskać na EU CBAM preparation to accelerate industrial decarbonization
Support NATO Green Defence Framework środowiskowy standards
i: ÇŞB — environment ministry. TEMA Vakfı — major Turkish środowiskowy NGO focused on soil and forest protection. Greenpeace Mediterranean — active in Türkiye on coal campaigns.
EÜAŞ — state electricity generation company. Significant private coal generation. Türkiye's 2053 net-zero target implies eventual coal phase-out but no timeline exists.
EPDK — energy market regulator. Türkiye ratified the Paris Agreement in 2021. EU Customs Union makes CBAM compliance relevant for Turkish industrial exports.

TBMM (Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi — Grand National Assembly) — unicameral, 600 members. Contact through tbmm.gov.tr. Türkiye is a presidential republic, NATO member, G20 member, EU customs union partner.

TT.s: Caribbean energy gospodarka ($25.6B PKB). Renty gazowe 5.09%, oil rents 2.71% PKB. Major petrochemical and LNG producer (Atlantic LNG). Produkcja na poziomie 14.4%. Usługi na poziomie 59.2%. Parliamentary demokracja.

sectors.w: Trinidad's petrochemical industry faces maturing gas fields and declining production. As reserves deplete and global LNG competition increases, nakładający się interes w fossil fuel dependence słabnie naturally.
bp: Declining natural gas reserves force economic diversification. Gdy production costs rise on mature fields, nakładający się interes w fossil fuel dependence słabnie as alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-facility emisje and środowiskowy monitoring at Point Lisas industrial estate and Atlantic LNG. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Nie do złamania. LNG and petrochemical processing emit CO₂ and other pollutants.
a: Zgłosić do EMA (Environmental Management Authority)
Zgłosić do MEEI (Ministry of Energy and Energy Industries)
Udokumentować przez Fishermen and Friends of the Sea (środowiskowy NGO)
NGC (National Gas Company): Opracować gas-to-renewables transition plan
Atlantic LNG: Wdrożyć carbon capture at liquefaction facility
Petrochemical companies (Methanex, Nutrien): Reduce process emisje
EMA: Wzmocnić air quality monitoring around Point Lisas
MEEI: Opracować energia odnawialna framework
RIC (Regulated Industries Commission): Zreformować energy pricing
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives (41 members) by zażądać economic diversification and energia odnawialna policy
Support CARICOM energy transition framework
Wspierać przez Alliance of Small Island States (AOSIS) for climate finance
Naciskać na IMO shipping emission standards (Trinidad is a major bunkering port)
i: EMA — the Environmental Management Authority, established under the Environmental Management Act 2000. Fishermen and Friends of the Sea — Trinidad's most active środowiskowy NGO.
NGC (National Gas Company of Trinidad and Tobago) — state gas company. Atlantic LNG — joint venture (Shell, BP, NGC). Point Lisas Industrial Estate — petrochemical complex.
MEEI — energy ministry. RIC — utilities regulator. Trinidad has extremely low domestic energy prices (subsidized), discouraging efficiency.
Parliament of Trinidad and Tobago — bicameral: House of Representatives (41 members) and Senate (31 members). Parliamentary demokracja with competitive elections. Contact through ttparliament.org.

TZ.s: East African gospodarka ($78.8B PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 23.3% PKB. Mining 4.03% (gold, tanzanite — found only in Tanzania). Renty leśne 2.39%. Gas reserves (offshore). Usługi na poziomie 29.6%. Growing gospodarka with improving governance.

sectors.w: Tanzania's gold górnictwo (Barrick/Twiga Minerals, AngloGold Ashanti) generates tailings and mercury contamination (artisanal sector). Gdy na kopalnię środowiskowy data is published alongside revenue, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Mining Act 2017 local content and przejrzystość requirements. Gdy enforced alongside środowiskowy monitoring, nakładający się interes w opaque extraction słabnie.
Per-mine środowiskowy monitoring data through TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative). Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Mercury-free artisanal górnictwo and improved tailings management reduce zależność systemowa.

i: NEMC — organ ochrony środowiska. Mining Commission — górnictwo sector regulator. LEAT — Tanzanian środowiskowy law NGO. HakiRasilimali (Publish What You Pay Tanzania) — revenue przejrzystość advocacy.

Twiga Minerals — 50/50 joint venture between Barrick Gold and Government of Tanzania (created after 2017 tax dispute). Geita Gold Mine — AngloGold Ashanti operation. STAMICO (State Mining Corporation) — government górnictwo entity.
Mining Commission — established under Mining Act 2017. TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member since 2009.

Bunge la Tanzania (National Assembly) — unicameral, 393 members. Tanzania is a presidential republic with increasing political openness under current administration. Contact through bunge.go.tz. EAC (East African Community) member.

UA.s: War-affected gospodarka ($190.7B PKB). Mining 5.32% PKB. Wydatki wojskowe 34.48% PKB (wartime). Rolnictwo na poziomie 7.1%. Coal 0.34%. kandydat do UE country (2022). Under Russian invasion since February 2022. Massive środowiskowy damage from war.

sectors.w: Ukraine's górnictwo sector (iron ore, manganese, titanium) has suffered massive środowiskowy damage from the Russian invasion — flooded mines, destroyed infrastructure, contaminated land. Post-war reconstruction offers opportunity for transparent środowiskowy standards. Gdy reconstruction środowiskowy data is published, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: EU accession conditionality requiring środowiskowy standards in post-war reconstruction. Gdy reconstruction adheres to EU środowiskowy acquis, nakładający się interes w rapid but dirty rebuilding słabnie.
Environmental damage assessment and remediation tracking. Ukraine's Ministry of Environmental Protection is already documenting war damage with international support. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes, but post-war reconstruction can implement best-practice tailings management and water treatment from the start.

Ministry of Environmental Protection: Egzekwować środowiskowy standards in reconstruction

Support Ukraine Recovery Conference środowiskowy commitments

i: Derzhekoinspektsiia — State Environmental Inspectorate. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources — documents war-related środowiskowy damage. Ecodozor — citizen reporting platform.
Metinvest — Ukraine's largest steel and górnictwo group (Rinat Akhmetov). ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih — major steel producer. Ferrexpo — iron ore pellet producer.
Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources. State Subsoil Service (Derzhgeonadra) — górnictwo licensing. Ukraine's EU candidacy requires środowiskowy acquis alignment.

Verkhovna Rada — unicameral, 450 members. Contact through rada.gov.ua. kandydat do UE country since 2022. International channels: EU accession process, Ukraine Recovery Conference, International Criminal Court (środowiskowy damage documentation).

UG.s: East African gospodarka ($53.9B PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 24.6% PKB. Renty leśne 7.48% (one of the highest in the dataset). Oil production beginning (Tilenga and Kingfisher projects, EACOP pipeline). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Uganda's new oil projects (TotalEnergies' Tilenga and CNOOC's Kingfisher, plus EACOP — East African Crude Oil Pipeline) face massive international scrutiny. Gdy project-level środowiskowy data is published, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: International ESG pressure on project financiers. Gdy banks and insurers withdraw from EACOP financing, nakładający się interes w unscrutinized pipeline construction słabnie. Several major banks have already declined.
Per-project środowiskowy impact data for Tilenga (in Murchison Falls National Park), Kingfisher, and EACOP. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Nie do złamania. Crude oil production and 1,443-km heated pipeline through sensitive ecosystems inherently create środowiskowy risk.

i: NEMA — organ ochrony środowiska. Note: Ugandan środowiskowy activists have faced government harassment. International channels are safer: 350.org has led the #StopEACOP campaign. BankTrack monitors EACOP financing.

TotalEnergies — operator of Tilenga project and EACOP. CNOOC Uganda — operates Kingfisher project. EACOP (East African Crude Oil Pipeline) — 1,443 km from Hoima to Tanga (Tanzania). UNOC (Uganda National Oil Company) — state oil company.
PAU — petroleum sector regulator. MEMD — energy and mineral development ministry. Uganda's Petroleum Revenue Management policy is under development.

Parliament of Uganda — unicameral, 529 members. Note: Uganda is effectively under one-party dominant governance (NRM). International channels: EAC (East African Community), African Court on Human and Peoples' Rights, European Parliament (regarding EU-headquartered companies like TotalEnergies).

UY.s: Small South American gospodarka ($81B PKB). Rolnictwo na poziomie 6.4% PKB. Usługi na poziomie 65.3%. Renty leśne 1.91%. Generates nearly 100% of electricity from renewables (wind, hydro, solar, biomass). Strong demokracja — one of Latin America's most stable.

sectors.w: Uruguay's soy and eucalyptus monoculture expansion is degrading soils and displacing native grasslands (campos). Gdy soil health and biodiversity data is linked to agricultural production per department, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: National soil conservation plan enforcement. Uruguay's Ley de Uso y Conservación de Suelos (Soil Use and Conservation Law) requires mandatory soil plans — strengthening enforcement breaks nakładający się interes w soil-exhaustive monoculture.
Per-farm soil erosion and grassland conversion monitoring. MGAP already requires Plan de Uso y Manejo de Suelos for farms >50 ha. Publishing compliance data makes W computable.
Częściowo łamalne. Soy monoculture and eucalyptus plantations degrade native grassland ecosystems. Integrated crop-livestock systems and native grassland preservation reduce zależność systemowa.

Zgłosić do RENARE (Dirección General de Recursos Naturales Renovables)

i: DINAMA — national environment directorate. RENARE — renewable natural resources directorate under MGAP. Vida Silvestre Uruguay — biodiversity conservation organization.
UPM (Finnish company) — major eucalyptus plantation and pulp mill operator. Montes del Plata (UPM/Arauco) — forestry. Large-scale soy farming often by Brazilian/Argentine operators.
MGAP — agriculture, livestock and fisheries ministry. INIA — national agricultural research institute.
Asamblea General — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (99 members) and Cámara de Senadores (30 members). Contact through parlamento.gub.uy. Uruguay is one of Latin America's strongest democracies.

UZ.s: Central Asian gospodarka ($115B PKB). Renty gazowe 11.04% PKB. Mining 8.5% (gold — Muruntau is world's largest open-pit gold mine, uranium). Rolnictwo na poziomie 18.3%. Produkcja na poziomie 20.2%. Post-Karimov liberalization (since 2016).

sectors.w: Uzbekistan's gas sector (Uzbekneftegaz) consumes most production domestically at heavily subsidized prices, encouraging waste. Gdy na złoże production and domestic consumption data is published, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Gas price reform eliminating subsidies that encourage wasteful consumption. Gdy domestic gas prices reflect market value, nakładający się interes w underpriced energy słabnie.
Per-field production, distribution, and consumption data. Uzbekistan has begun EITI implementation. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Gas combustion emits CO₂. However, Uzbekistan's enormous solar potential (300+ sunny days/year) can displace gas in electricity generation.

i: State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection (Goskomekologiya) — środowiskowy regulator. EITI Uzbekistan — Uzbekistan became an EITI member in 2021.
Uzbekneftegaz — state gas company. NMMC (Navoi Mining and Metallurgical Company) — operates Muruntau gold mine (world's largest open-pit) and uranium mines. Almalyk MMC — copper and gold górnictwo.
Ministry of Energy — energy policy. Goskomekologiya — środowiskowy regulation. Uzbekistan has been implementing significant economic reforms since 2016.

Oliy Majlis — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (Qonunchilik palatasi, 150 members) and Senate, 100 members. Note: limited political pluralism. International channels: EITI, EBRD, ADB, SCO. Aral Sea środowiskowy disaster requires international cooperation.

VE.s: Oil-dependent gospodarka in crisis ($119.8B PKB — severely contracted from peak). World's largest proven oil reserves. Economic data largely unavailable (World Bank reports zeros for most indicators). Hyperinflation, mass emigration. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Venezuela's oil industry has collapsed from ~3.3M bpd (1990s) to ~700K bpd due to mismanagement, underinvestment, and sankcje. The nakładający się interes is already weakened by operational failure.
bp: Production collapse has already weakened the nakładający się interes — PDVSA lacks the capital and technical capacity to maintain production. Sanctions further constrain revenue.
Oil revenue przejrzystość is impossible under current governance opacity. However, international sankcje monitoring (OFAC designations) provides partial W computability.
Nie do złamania. Oil extraction and refining emit CO₂. Venezuela's heavy crude (Orinoco Belt) is particularly emisje-intensive to process.

Support post-transition EITI membership planning
i: Note: No independent domestic institutions exist. Transparencia Venezuela — anti-corruption NGO. PROVEA — Venezuelan human rights organization. Operating environment is extremely hostile to społeczeństwo obywatelskie.
PDVSA (Petróleos de Venezuela, S.A.) — state oil company, severely degraded operationally. Chevron — received limited US OFAC license to operate. Repsol, ENI — maintain limited presence.

No independent domestic regulation exists. OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control, US Treasury) — administers Venezuela sankcje. EU — maintains sankcje. PDVSA is both regulator and operator — no separation exists.

Asamblea Nacional — 277 members. Note: Venezuela's institutions lack independence under current governance. International channels: OAS (Venezuela withdrawn/suspended), International Contact Group, ICC preliminary examination, Lima Group (reduced activity).

VN.s: Fast-growing gospodarka ($476.4B PKB). Produkcja na poziomie 24.4% PKB. Rolnictwo na poziomie 11.9%. Renty węglowe 0.38%. Oil 0.67%. Renty leśne 1.07%. Major electronics and textile manufacturing hub. One-party state (Communist Party).

sectors.w: Viet Nam is rapidly expanding coal power capacity despite excellent renewable potential (solar, wind, offshore wind). JETP (Just Energy Transition Partnership) funding ($15.5B pledged) creates leverage to shift the nakładający się interes away from coal.
bp: JETP implementation — $15.5B pledged by international partners for coal-to-renewables transition. Gdy JETP funding makes renewables cheaper than new coal, nakładający się interes w coal expansion breaks.
Per-plant emisje and health cost data. Viet Nam's coal plants are concentrated in the north (Quảng Ninh) and south (Bình Thuận). Czyni W obliczalnym.
Nie do złamania. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.

i: MONRE — environment and natural resources ministry. VUSTA — umbrella organization for Vietnamese społeczeństwo obywatelskie (within party framework). Note: independent społeczeństwo obywatelskie is not permitted in Viet Nam's one-party system.

EVN (Tập đoàn Điện lực Việt Nam) — state electricity utility. PVN (PetroVietnam) — state oil and gas company. TKV (Vinacomin — Tập đoàn Công nghiệp Than - Khoáng sản Việt Nam) — state coal górnictwo company.

MOIT — energy and industrial policy. PDP VIII (Power Opracowaćment Plan VIII, approved 2023) — sets energia odnawialna targets. JETP — Just Energy Transition Partnership ($15.5B pledged by IPG partners including US, EU, UK, Japan).

Quốc hội (National Assembly) — unicameral, 500 members. Viet Nam is a państwo jednopartyjne (Communist Party). JETP International Partners Group provides the primary leverage mechanism. International channels: ASEAN, World Bank, ADB, JETP IPG.

XK.s: Small Western Balkan gospodarka ($11.2B PKB). Produkcja na poziomie 12.6%. Renty węglowe 0.38%. Mining 0.55%. Rolnictwo na poziomie 7.3%. Youngest population in Europe. kandydat do UE status pending. Two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A and B) supply ~95% of electricity.

sectors.w: Kosovo's near-total dependence on two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A — one of Europe's worst polluters — and Kosovo B) faces EU accession conditionality and enormous health costs.
bp: EU accession pathway requiring IED/LCPD compliance. Kosovo A is scheduled for decommissioning. Gdy środowiskowy compliance costs are applied, new renewables are cheaper than coal retrofit.
Per-plant emisje and health cost data. Kosovo A and B cause severe air pollution in Pristina — among Europe's worst air quality. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Nie do złamania. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.

Inwestować w solar and wind capacity

MMPH (Ministry of Environment): Egzekwować emission standards

Support EU integration benchmarks on środowiskowy standards
Wspierać przez Energy Community for just transition support
Naciskać na World Bank and EBRD financing of energia odnawialna replacement
i: AMMK — środowiskowy protection agency. INDEP (Institute for Opracowaćment Policy) — research and advocacy. GAP Institute — Kosovo public policy think tank.
KEK — Kosovo Energy Corporation, państwowe, operates Kosovo A (5 units, 800 MW, built 1962-1975) and Kosovo B (2 units, 678 MW, built 1983-1984). KOSTT — transmission system operator.
ERO — regulator energii. MMPH (Ministria e Mjedisit, Planifikimit Hapësinor dhe Infrastrukturës) — environment ministry. Kosovo is an Energy Community Treaty member.

Kuvendi i Kosovës (Assembly of Kosovo) — unicameral, 120 members. Contact through kuvendikosoves.org. Kosovo declared independence in 2008 (recognized by ~100 UN members). Energy Community Treaty member.

ZA.s: Largest sub-Saharan gospodarka ($401.1B PKB). Renty węglowe 2.44% PKB. Mining 3.83% (gold, platinum group metals, chrome, manganese). Produkcja na poziomie 12.8%. Usługi na poziomie 63%. Constitutional demokracja. Severe electricity crisis (load shedding).

sectors.w: South Africa generates ~80% of electricity from coal (Eskom's aging fleet). JETP funding ($8.5B pledged) and Eskom's operational crisis (load shedding) create dual pressure. Gdy coal plant health costs are internalized, the nakładający się interes breaks.
bp: JETP implementation and Eskom restructuring. $8.5B pledged for coal-to-renewables transition. Gdy renewable IPPs are cheaper and more reliable than aging coal plants, nakładający się interes w coal dependence breaks.

Per-plant emisje, health costs, and reliability data. Eskom's coal fleet is extensively documented — multiple plants fail to meet South Africa's own emission standards (granted repeated postponements). Czyni W obliczalnym.
Nie do złamania. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂. South Africa's coal is high-ash content, exacerbating particulate emisje.
a: Zgłosić do DFFE (Department of Forestry, Rybołówstwo and the Environment)
Report through groundWork or Centre for Environmental Rights
Udokumentować przez Public Protector complaints
Eskom: Wdrożyć coal plant decommissioning schedule aligned with IRP 2019

NERSA (National Energy Regulator): Zreformować tariffs to reflect coal externalities
DFFE: Egzekwować Minimum Emission Standards without further postponements
DMRE (Department of Mineral Resources and Energy): Accelerate IRP 2019 renewable targets

Support JETP implementation and accountability mechanisms
Wspierać przez BRICS for just energy transition principles
Naciskać na climate finance delivery through Green Climate Fund
i: DFFE — the environment department. groundWork — South African środowiskowy justice organization. Centre for Environmental Rights — public interest środowiskowy law organization. Life After Coal campaign — coalition challenging Eskom's coal dependence.

Eskom — state electricity utility, operates 15 coal-fired power stations. Exxaro Resources — coal górnictwo. Thungela Resources — thermal coal (spun off from Anglo American). Seriti Resources — coal górnictwo. REIPPPP (Renewable Energy Independent Power Producer Procurement Programme) — auction program.

NERSA — regulator energii. DMRE — mineral resources and energy department. IRP 2019 (Integrated Resource Plan) — South Africa's electricity plan. JETP Investment Plan — guides $8.5B transition funding.

Parliament of South Africa — bicameral: National Assembly (400 members) and National Council of Provinces (90 members). Contact through parliament.gov.za. South Africa is a constitutional demokracja, G20 member, BRICS member. JETP International Partners Group: France, Germany, UK, US, EU.

ZM.s: Southern African gospodarka ($25.3B PKB). Mining 28.25% PKB — one of the highest górnictwo dependencies globally (copper). Renty leśne 6.78%. Usługi na poziomie 57.2%. Africa's second-largest copper producer. Democratic governance with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Zambia's copper górnictwo generates acid mine drainage and SO₂ from smelting (Mopani, KCM — historically among Africa's worst polluters). Gdy na kopalnię środowiskowy data is published, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: Mining royalty reform with środowiskowy earmarking. Gdy górnictwo revenue is partly allocated to środowiskowy remediation, nakładający się interes w externalizing pollution costs słabnie.
Per-mine środowiskowy monitoring data through ZEITI and ZEMA. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Copper smelting emisje can be reduced with modern sulfuric acid capture technology. Mopani smelter upgrade demonstrates this.
a: Zgłosić do ZEMA (Zambia Environmental Management Agency)
Udokumentować przez community organizations in Copperbelt Province
Report through górnictwo company compliance channels
First Quantum Minerals (Kansanshi): Wdrożyć international środowiskowy standards
Barrick Gold (Lumwana): Przyjąć enhanced tailings management
ZCCM-IH (state górnictwo holding): Require środowiskowy compliance from partners
ZEMA: Egzekwować emission standards for copper smelters
Ministry of Mines: Wzmocnić środowiskowy conditions in górnictwo licenses
ZEITI: Expand to include środowiskowy data
Skontaktuj się ze swoim Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (156 members) by zażądać środowiskowy enforcement on the Copperbelt
Support EITI enhanced reporting with środowiskowy data
Wspierać przez SADC for regional górnictwo środowiskowy standards
Naciskać na responsible mineral supply chain standards (copper is critical for energy transition)
i: ZEMA — środowiskowy management agency. Copperbelt communities have suffered decades of SO₂ and heavy metal pollution — documented by multiple studies and legal cases (e.g., Vedanta/KCM litigation in UK courts).

First Quantum Minerals — operates Kansanshi (one of Africa's largest copper mines) and Sentinel mines. Barrick Gold — operates Lumwana copper mine. Mopani Copper Mines — majority owned by ZCCM-IH after Glencore divestment. KCM (Konkola Copper Mines) — under provisional liquidation.
Ministry of Mines and Minerals Opracowaćment. ZEITI (Zambia Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member. Mining Cadastre Department — licensing authority.

National Assembly of Zambia — unicameral, 156 elected members + 8 nominated. Contact through parliament.gov.zm. Zambia is a presidential republic with competitive elections (peaceful transitions in 1991, 2011, 2021). SADC (Southern African Opracowaćment Community) member.

ZW.s: Southern African gospodarka ($41.5B PKB). Mining 4.24% PKB (platinum group metals, gold, lithium, diamonds). Rolnictwo na poziomie 8.7%. Produkcja na poziomie 15.6%. Renty leśne 1.82%. Governance concerns. Major lithium reserves (Bikita, Arcadia).

sectors.w: Zimbabwe's górnictwo sector is expanding rapidly (lithium — critical for EV batteries — and PGMs). Gdy na kopalnię środowiskowy data is published alongside revenue, W staje się obliczalne.
bp: International supply chain due diligence for critical minerals (lithium for EU Battery Regulation compliance). Gdy EU buyers require środowiskowy verification, nakładający się interes w unregulated extraction słabnie.
Per-mine środowiskowy monitoring through ZEITI (Zimbabwe applied for EITI candidacy). Czyni W obliczalnym.
Częściowo łamalne. Lithium górnictwo (hard-rock) generates waste rock and uses water. Best-practice processing and water recycling reduce zależność systemowa.
a: Zgłosić do EMA (Environmental Management Agency)
Udokumentować przez ZELA (Zimbabwe Environmental Law Association)
Report through international górnictwo company compliance channels
Zimplats (Impala Platinum): Wdrożyć international środowiskowy standards
Prospect Lithium (Bikita Minerals): Przyjąć responsible lithium górnictwo practices
Zim Integrated (Arcadia): Apply EU Battery Regulation-aligned środowiskowy standards
Ministry of Mines: Egzekwować środowiskowy conditions in górnictwo licenses
EMA: Wzmocnić środowiskowy impact assessment for lithium projects
ZMDC (Zimbabwe Mining Opracowaćment Corporation): Require środowiskowy compliance from joint venture partners
Engage through available parlamentarny channels — Parliament of Zimbabwe: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members); note limited political pluralism in practice
Support EU Battery Regulation supply chain due diligence requirements for Zimbabwean lithium
Wspierać przez SADC Mining Protocol for regional środowiskowy standards
Naciskać na EITI membership to improve górnictwo przejrzystość
i: EMA — środowiskowy management agency. ZELA — środowiskowy law organization. Note: społeczeństwo obywatelskie space is constrained in Zimbabwe.

Zimplats — Zimbabwe's largest PGM producer (Impala Platinum subsidiary). Bikita Minerals — lithium górnictwo (Sinomine Resources acquired). Arcadia Lithium — major lithium deposit (Zhejiang Huayou Cobalt acquired). Caledonia Mining — gold.
Ministry of Mines and Mining Opracowaćment. EMA — środowiskowy regulation. ZMDC — state górnictwo company. Zimbabwe's Mines and Minerals Act governs the sector.

Parliament of Zimbabwe — bicameral: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members). Note: ZANU-PF dominance limits effective legislative oversight. International channels: SADC, AU, EITI (Zimbabwe has expressed interest in joining).

CN.s: World's second-largest gospodarka ($18,743.8B PKB). Produkcja na poziomie 24.9% PKB — global factory floor. Renty węglowe 0.61%. Przemysł na poziomie 36.5%. Usługi na poziomie 56.7%. One-party state (CPC). World's largest CO₂ emitter. Rapid renewable deployment alongside continued coal expansion.

sectors.w: China operates ~1,100 GW of coal capacity — more than the rest of the world combined. However, China also deploys more energia odnawialna annually than any other country. Gdy renewable deployment makes new coal uneconomic, nakładający się interes w coal expansion breaks.
bp: Renewable energy cost competitiveness — China's solar and wind are already cheaper than new coal in most provinces. Gdy existing coal plants become more expensive to run than new renewables, the nakładający się interes breaks. This is already happening in eastern provinces.
Per-plant emisje data. China's national ETS (launched 2021) covers ~4.5 billion tonnes CO₂. Expanding coverage from electricity to industry sectors makes W computable.
Nie do złamania. Coal combustion releases CO₂, SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury by chemistry.
a: Zgłosić do MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment, 生态环境部)
Report through provincial środowiskowy protection bureaus
Udokumentować przez 12369 środowiskowy complaint hotline
State energy companies (CHN Energy, Huaneng, Datang, Huadian, SPIC): Accelerate coal-to-renewables transition
Reduce new coal plant approvals
Inwestować w grid-scale storage to enable renewable integration
NEA (National Energy Administration, 国家能源局): Limit new coal approvals to replace-and-retire
MEE: Accelerate national ETS coverage expansion to cement, steel, aluminum
NDRC: Align electricity market reform with carbon reduction targets
Support US-China climate cooperation mechanisms (Sunnylands process)
Wspierać przez COP process for China's coal phase-down commitments
Naciskać na national ETS carbon price to rise above marginal abatement cost
Support technology cooperation on CCS and grid-scale storage
i: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) — central organ ochrony środowiska. 12369 hotline — środowiskowy complaint system receiving millions of reports annually. Provincial Environmental Protection Bureaus — local enforcement. IPE (Institute of Public & Environmental Affairs, 公众环境研究中心) — Ma Jun's NGO providing corporate środowiskowy data.

China's 'Big Five' power generators: CHN Energy (国家能源集团), China Huaneng (华能), China Datang (大唐), China Huadian (华电), SPIC (国家电投). All państwowe, collectively operating most coal capacity. Also rapidly scaling renewables.

NEA (National Energy Administration) — energy planning and regulation. NDRC (National Opracowaćment and Zreformować Commission, 国家发展和改革委员会) — economic planning, sets electricity prices. National ETS — world's largest carbon market by coverage (power sector).

National People's Congress (全国人民代表大会) — ~3,000 members. China is a państwo jednopartyjne — the NPC does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: US-China climate bilateral, COP/UNFCCC, G20. China's dual carbon targets: peak CO₂ before 2030, carbon neutrality by 2060.

KR.s: Advanced gospodarka ($1,875.4B PKB). Produkcja na poziomie 26.6% PKB (semiconductors, automobiles, shipbuilding, petrochemicals). Usługi na poziomie 57.5%. Heavy energy import dependence. Fourth-largest coal importer globally. G20 member. Vibrant demokracja.

sectors.w: South Korea operates ~37 GW of coal capacity and is the world's 4th-largest coal importer. The 10th Basic Plan for Electricity Supply and Demand targets coal phase-down. Gdy carbon pricing (K-ETS) makes coal uncompetitive versus LNG and renewables, the nakładający się interes breaks.
bp: K-ETS (Korea Emissions Trading Scheme) carbon price escalation. Gdy carbon costs make coal-fired generation more expensive than LNG and renewables, nakładający się interes w coal dependence breaks.
Per-plant emisje and health cost data. Korea Environment Institute and Korean medical associations have documented coal plant health impacts. Czyni W obliczalnym.
Nie do złamania. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: Zgłosić do Ministry of Environment (환경부)
Udokumentować przez KFEM (Korean Federation for Environmental Movements, 환경운동연합)
Report through KEPCO compliance channels
KEPCO (Korea Electric Power Corporation, 한국전력공사): Wdrożyć coal retirement schedule aligned with NDC
POSCO: Scale hydrogen-based steelmaking (HyREX)
Samsung, SK, Hyundai: Expand renewable electricity procurement (RE100 commitments)
MOTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy, 산업통상자원부): Accelerate coal retirement in Basic Electricity Plan
Ministry of Environment: Wzmocnić K-ETS carbon price floor
KPX (Korea Power Exchange): Zreformować merit order to disadvantage coal
Skontaktuj się ze swoim 국회의원 (Member of the National Assembly, 300 members) by zażądać coal phase-out timeline in energy legislation
Support Powering Past Coal Alliance membership
Wspierać przez OECD for coal finance phase-out
Naciskać na G20 commitment to end international coal financing (South Korea pledged to end overseas coal finance in 2021)
i: Ministry of Environment (환경부) — organ ochrony środowiska. KFEM (환경운동연합) — South Korea's largest środowiskowy NGO. Solutions for Our Climate (기후솔루션) — climate policy advocacy organization.
KEPCO — state electricity company (subsidiary gencos operate coal plants). POSCO — steelmaker, major coal consumer. Samsung, SK Group, Hyundai — major conglomerates with growing RE100 commitments.
MOTIE — energy and industry ministry. K-ETS — Korea Emissions Trading Scheme (launched 2015, covers ~70% of national emisje). KPX (한국전력거래소) — electricity market operator.

국회 (National Assembly) — unicameral, 300 members. Contact through assembly.go.kr. South Korea is a presidential republic with competitive elections. G20 member, OECD member, Powering Past Coal Alliance member (joined 2021).
